+param (
+    [string]$commitMessage
+)
+
+# Get current branch name
+$BRANCH_NAME = (git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD).Trim()
+
+# Removed automatic staging. Ensure changes are staged before running this script.
+
+# Check if the commit message is empty
+if ([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($commitMessage)) {
+  Write-Error "Commit message parameter is empty. Aborting commit."
+  exit 1
+}
+
+Write-Host "Committing changes..."
+# Commit changes
+git commit -m "$commitMessage"
+
+Write-Host "Pushing changes to the current branch: $BRANCH_NAME"
+# Push changes to the current branch
+git push origin "$BRANCH_NAME"
+
+# Check if gh cli is installed
+$gh_installed = $false
+try {
+    gh --version | Out-Null
+    $gh_installed = $true
+} catch {
+    Write-Warning "GitHub CLI (gh) is not installed or not in PATH. Skipping Pull Request creation and deployment monitoring."
+}
+
+if ($gh_installed) {
+    Write-Host "Creating Pull Request..."
+    # Extract first line for PR title (conventional commit title)
+    $PR_TITLE = ($commitMessage.Split("`n") | Select-Object -First 1).Trim()
+    
+    # Create a temporary file for the PR body
+    $tempBodyFile = Join-Path $env:TEMP "pr_body.txt"
+    $commitMessage | Out-File $tempBodyFile -Encoding UTF8
+
+    gh pr create --title "$PR_TITLE" --body-file "$tempBodyFile" --base main --head "$BRANCH_NAME"
+
+    # Clean up the temporary file
+    Remove-Item $tempBodyFile
+
+    Write-Host "Pull Request creation initiated."
+
+    Write-Host "Monitoring GitHub Actions for deployment preview..."
+
+    $runStatus = ""
+    $runConclusion = ""
+    $runId = ""
+    $deployPreviewJobId = ""
+    $previewUrl = ""
+
+    while ($runStatus -ne "completed" -or $runConclusion -ne "success") {
+        Write-Host "Checking for latest GitHub Actions run on branch '$BRANCH_NAME'..."
+        # Get the latest run for the current branch
+        $latestRunJson = gh run list --branch $BRANCH_NAME --limit 1 --json status,conclusion,databaseId | ConvertFrom-Json
+
+        if ($latestRunJson.Length -gt 0) {
+            $runStatus = $latestRunJson[0].status
+            $runConclusion = $latestRunJson[0].conclusion
+            $runId = $latestRunJson[0].databaseId
+
+            Write-Host "Latest run status: $runStatus, conclusion: $runConclusion"
+
+            if ($runStatus -eq "completed" -and $runConclusion -eq "success") {
+                Write-Host "Deployment run completed successfully. Getting job details..."
+                $jobDetailsJson = gh run view $runId --json jobs | ConvertFrom-Json
+
+                foreach ($job in $jobDetailsJson.jobs) {
+                    if ($job.name -eq "Deploy Preview (PR)") {
+                        $deployPreviewJobId = $job.databaseId
+                        Write-Host "Found 'Deploy Preview (PR)' job with ID: $deployPreviewJobId"
+                        break
+                    }
+                }
+
+                if ($deployPreviewJobId) {
+                    Write-Host "Fetching logs for 'Deploy Preview (PR)' job..."
+                    $jobLogs = gh run view $runId --job $deployPreviewJobId --log
+
+                    # Regex to find the preview URL
+                    $urlPattern = '\"url\": \"(https:\/\/.*--pr-.*\.web\.app)\"'
+                    $match = [regex]::Match($jobLogs, $urlPattern)
+
+                    if ($match.Success) {
+                        $previewUrl = $match.Groups[1].Value
+                        Write-Host "Preview URL found: $previewUrl"
+                        Write-Host "Please check the preview link: $previewUrl"
+                        Write-Host "Waiting for user confirmation to merge the branch..."
+                        # This is where the script would pause and wait for user input
+                        # For the purpose of this script, we will just output the URL.
+                        # The user interaction for confirmation will be handled by the agent.
+                    } else {
+                        Write-Warning "Could not find preview URL in job logs."
+                    }
+                } else {
+                    Write-Warning "Could not find 'Deploy Preview (PR)' job."
+                }
+            } elseif ($runStatus -eq "completed" -and $runConclusion -ne "success") {
+                Write-Error "Deployment run completed with status '$runStatus' and conclusion '$runConclusion'. Aborting."
+                exit 1
+            }
+        } else {
+            Write-Host "No GitHub Actions runs found for branch '$BRANCH_NAME'. Waiting..."
+        }
+        Start-Sleep -Seconds 30 # Wait for 30 seconds before checking again
+    }
+} else {
+    Write-Host "Changes committed and pushed to branch: $BRANCH_NAME"
+    Write-Host "GitHub CLI (gh) is not installed. Skipping Pull Request creation and deployment monitoring."
+    Write-Host "You can now create a Pull Request for this branch manually."
+    Write-Host "If you are using GitHub, you can typically create a PR by navigating to your repository on GitHub and looking for a 'Compare & pull request' button."
+}

+# Script de PowerShell pour automatiser la compilation et le déploiement.
+
+# --- Configuration des Chemins ---
+$BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR = "dist" 
+$FIREBASE_PUBLIC_DIR = "build" 
+
+# --- Récupération du message de commit en paramètre ($args[0]) ---
+# Utilise le premier argument fourni au script.
+if ($args.Count -ge 1 -and $args[0] -ne "") {
+    $COMMIT_MESSAGE = $args[0]
+} else {
+    # Message par défaut si aucun paramètre n'est fourni
+    $COMMIT_MESSAGE = "Automated deployment: no commit message provided"
+}
+
+# 1. Exécuter la Compilations NPM (Vite)
+Write-Host ">>> Lancement de la compilation Vite..."
+npm run build:production
+
+if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
+    Write-Error "NPM/Vite build failed. Exiting deployment."
+    exit 1
+}
+
+# 2. Copier les fichiers de 'dist' vers 'build'
+Write-Host ">>> Copie des fichiers compiles de '$BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR' vers '$FIREBASE_PUBLIC_DIR'..."
+Remove-Item -Path "$FIREBASE_PUBLIC_DIR\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
+Copy-Item -Path "$BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR\*" -Destination $FIREBASE_PUBLIC_DIR -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop
+
+# 3. Séquence Git (Commit et Push)
+Write-Host ">>> Realisation du commit avec le message: '$COMMIT_MESSAGE'"
+git add .
+git commit -m "$COMMIT_MESSAGE" 
+git push origin main
+Write-Host ">>> Deploiement Git termine."

+Voici la description technique exhaustive de la configuration actuelle des comptes de service, basée sur les captures d'écran des trois environnements (**dev**, **staging**, **prod**). Ces informations sont structurées pour vous permettre d'adapter vos fichiers de configuration ou vos appels API.
+
+### **1. Comptes de Service par Défaut (Communs aux 3 projets)**
+
+Chaque projet possède deux comptes créés automatiquement avec le rôle **Éditeur (Editor)**. Ils sont identifiés par le numéro de projet unique.
+
+* **Compute Engine Default Service Account**
+* **Format ID :** `[PROJECT_NUMBER]-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com`
+* **Rôle :** `roles/editor`
+* **Usage :** Utilisé par défaut par les instances VM, Cloud Run, ou Cloud Functions si aucun autre compte n'est spécifié.
+
+
+* **App Engine Default Service Account**
+* **Format ID :** `[PROJECT_ID]@appspot.gserviceaccount.com`
+* **Rôle :** `roles/editor`
+* **Usage :** Identité par défaut pour les services déployés sur App Engine.
+
+
+
+---
+
+### **2. Comptes Firebase Admin SDK (Par projet)**
+
+Ces comptes sont essentiels pour l'initialisation du SDK Admin dans votre code (Node.js, Python, etc.).
+
+* **Principal :** `firebase-adminsdk-fbsvc@[PROJECT_ID].iam.gserviceaccount.com`
+* **Rôles attribués :**
+1. `Firebase SDK Admin Service Agent`
+2. `Firebase Authentication Admin`
+3. `Service Account Token Creator` (Permet de générer des jetons personnalisés via `createCustomToken()`).
+
+
+* **IDs spécifiques par environnement :**
+* **Dev :** `firebase-adminsdk-fbsvc@dashboard-mictlan-dev.iam...`
+* **Staging :** `firebase-adminsdk-fbsvc@dashboard-mictlan-staging.iam...`
+* **Prod :** `firebase-adminsdk-fbsvc@dashboard-mictlan-prod.iam...`
+
+
+
+---
+
+### **3. Comptes de Déploiement CI/CD (Production)**
+
+L'environnement de production dispose de deux comptes spécifiques utilisés pour les pipelines de déploiement (GitHub Actions).
+
+* **GitHub Actions Deployer (Production)**
+* **ID :** `github-actions-deployer@dashboard-mictlan-prod.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
+* **Rôle :** `Firebase Hosting Admin` (Droits de déploiement sur Hosting).
+
+
+* **GitHub Preview Deployer (Cross-Project)**
+* **ID :** `github-preview-deployer@dashboard-mictlan-staging.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
+* **Rôle en Prod :** `Firebase Hosting Admin`.
+* **Note pour le code :** Ce compte appartient techniquement au projet **Staging** mais possède des permissions sur le projet **Prod** (probablement pour gérer les "Preview Channels").
+
+
+
+---
+
+### **Récapitulatif des identifiants (Project IDs)**
+
+Si vous devez configurer vos variables d'environnement (`.env`), voici les IDs à utiliser :
+
+1. **Développement :** `dashboard-mictlan-dev`
+2. **Staging :** `dashboard-mictlan-staging`
+3. **Production :** `dashboard-mictlan-prod`
+
+**Vérification factuelle :**
+
+* **Source :** Captures d'écran IAM fournies.
 * **Statut :** Les comptes listés sont actifs et possèdent les rôles `Éditeur`, `Firebase Admin`, et `Hosting Admin` selon l'interface Google Cloud affichée.
\ No newline at end of file

+import globals from "globals";
+import pluginReact from "eslint-plugin-react";
+import pluginReactHooks from "eslint-plugin-react-hooks";
+import pluginReactRefresh from "eslint-plugin-react-refresh";

+export default [
+  eslint.configs.recommended,
+  {
+    files: ["src/**/*.{js,jsx,mjs,cjs,ts,tsx}", "*.js"], // Explicitly define files to lint, excluding dist
+    languageOptions: {
+      parserOptions: {
+        ecmaFeatures: {
+          jsx: true,

-exports.updateUserPassword = onCall(async (request) => {

+const functions = require("firebase-functions");
+const { onCall, HttpsError } = require('firebase-functions/v2/https');
+const admin = require("firebase-admin");
+const vision = require('@google-cloud/vision'); // Added for OCR
+const cors = require('cors')({origin: true});
+const fetch = require('node-fetch');
+
+// Initialize Firebase Admin SDK
+admin.initializeApp();
+
+const db = admin.firestore();
+const visionClient = new vision.ImageAnnotatorClient(); // Initialized for OCR
+
+// --- Helper function to check if user is admin ---
+const isAuthenticatedAdmin = async (context) => {
+  if (!context.auth) {
+    throw new functions.https.HttpsError('unauthenticated', 'The function must be called while authenticated.');
+  }
+
+  const uid = context.auth.uid;
+  const userDoc = await db.collection('users').doc(uid).get(); // Assuming 'users' collection stores user roles
+  if (!userDoc.exists) {
+    throw new functions.https.HttpsError('not-found', 'User data not found.');
+  }
+  const userData = userDoc.data();
+  if (userData.role !== 'admin') {
+    throw new functions.https.HttpsError('permission-denied', 'Only admin users can perform this action.');
+  }
+  return true;
+};
+
+// --- Helper function to extract and verify ID token ---
+const getAuthenticatedUser = async (req) => {
+  if (!req.headers.authorization || !req.headers.authorization.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
+    throw new functions.https.HttpsError(
+      'unauthenticated',
+      'Request is not authorized. Requires Bearer token.'
+    );
+  }
+  const idToken = req.headers.authorization.split('Bearer ')[1];
+  try {
+    const decodedToken = await admin.auth().verifyIdToken(idToken);
+    return decodedToken;
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Error while verifying Firebase ID token:', error);
+    throw new functions.https.HttpsError('unauthenticated', 'Authentication failed. Invalid token.');
+  }
+};
+
+
+// --- Populate Products Cloud Function ---

+

+      const getDate = (daysOffset) => {
+        const d = new Date(now);
+        d.setDate(now.getDate() + daysOffset);
+        return admin.firestore.Timestamp.fromDate(d);
+      };
+

+        { name: 'TEST - Yaourt Grec Nature', weight: 150, unit: 'g', expiryDate: getDate(2), quantity: 5, category: 'Laitier', price: 1.20, photos: ['https://source.unsplash.com/random/100x100?yogurt'], decisionStatus: 'to_handle', creationDate: admin.firestore.Timestamp.fromDate(now), isTestData: true },

+        { name: 'TEST - Saumon Fumé', weight: 120, unit: 'g', expiryDate: getDate(-1), quantity: 1, category: 'Poisson', price: 7.90, photos: ['https://source.unsplash.com/random/100x100?salmon'], decisionStatus: 'to_handle', creationDate: admin.firestore.Timestamp.fromDate(now), isTestData: true },
+        { name: 'TEST - Fromage à la Coupe', weight: 250, unit: 'g', expiryDate: getDate(2), quantity: 1, category: 'Fromage', price: 8.50, photos: ['https://source.unsplash.com/random/100x100?cheese'], decisionStatus: 'promoted', creationDate: admin.firestore.Timestamp.fromDate(now), isTestData: true },
+        { name: 'TEST - Jambon Cuit Tranché', weight: 150, unit: 'g', expiryDate: getDate(0), quantity: 1, category: 'Charcuterie', price: 3.80, photos: ['https://source.unsplash.com/random/100x100?ham'], decisionStatus: 'donated', creationDate: admin.firestore.Timestamp.fromDate(now), isTestData: true },
+      ];
+
+      testProducts.forEach(product => {
+        batch.set(productsRef.doc(), product);
+      });
+
+      await batch.commit();
+      res.status(200).json({ message: `Successfully added ${testProducts.length} test products.` });
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error in populateProducts:", error);
+      res.status(500).send('An error occurred in populateProducts.');
+    }
+  });
+});
+
+// --- Clear Products Cloud Function ---
+exports.clearProducts = functions.https.onRequest((req, res) => {
+  cors(req, res, async () => {
+    try {
+      const productsRef = db.collection('products');
+      const snapshot = await productsRef.where('isTestData', '==', true).get();
+      if (snapshot.empty) {
+        res.status(200).json({ message: 'No test products found in "products" collection. Nothing to delete.' });
+        return;
+      }
+      const batch = db.batch();
+      snapshot.docs.forEach(doc => {
+        batch.delete(doc.ref);
+      });
+      await batch.commit();
+      res.status(200).json({ message: `Successfully deleted ${snapshot.docs.length} test documents from "products" collection.` });
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error in clearProducts:", error);
+      res.status(500).send('An error occurred in clearProducts.');
+    }
+  });
+});
+
+// --- Clear Dishes Cloud Function ---
+exports.clearDishes = functions.https.onRequest((req, res) => {
+  cors(req, res, async () => {
+    try {
+      const dishesRef = db.collection('dishes');
+      const snapshot = await dishesRef.where('isTestData', '==', true).get();
+      if (snapshot.empty) {
+        res.status(200).json({ message: 'No test dishes found in "dishes" collection. Nothing to delete.' });
+        return;
+      }
+      const batch = db.batch();
+      snapshot.docs.forEach(doc => {
+        batch.delete(doc.ref);
+      });
+      await batch.commit();
+      res.status(200).json({ message: `Successfully deleted ${snapshot.docs.length} test documents from "dishes" collection.` });
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error in clearDishes:", error);
+      res.status(500).send('An error occurred in clearDishes.');
+    }
+  });
+});
+
+// --- Clear Anonymous Users Cloud Function ---
+exports.clearAnonymousUsers = functions.https.onRequest((req, res) => {
+  cors(req, res, async () => {
+    try {
+      const authenticatedUser = await getAuthenticatedUser(req);
+      const context = { auth: { uid: authenticatedUser.uid } };
+      await isAuthenticatedAdmin(context);
+      const usersRef = db.collection('users');
+      const nullEmailSnapshot = await usersRef.where('email', '==', null).get();
+      const emptyEmailSnapshot = await usersRef.where('email', '==', '').get();
+      const batch = db.batch();
+      let deletedCount = 0;
+      nullEmailSnapshot.docs.forEach(doc => {
+        batch.delete(doc.ref);
+        deletedCount++;
+      });
+      emptyEmailSnapshot.docs.forEach(doc => {
+          batch.delete(doc.ref);
+          deletedCount++;
+      });
+      await batch.commit();
+      res.status(200).json({ message: `Successfully deleted ${deletedCount} anonymous user documents.` });
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error in clearAnonymousUsers:", error);
+      res.status(500).send('An error occurred in clearAnonymousUsers.');
+    }
+  });
+});
+
+// --- Populate Dishes Cloud Function ---
+exports.populateDishes = functions.https.onRequest((req, res) => {
+  cors(req, res, async () => {
+    try {
+      const productsSnapshot = await db.collection('products').get();
+      const products = productsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
+      const productNameToIdMap = {};
+      products.forEach(p => {
+        productNameToIdMap[p.name] = p.id;
+      });
+      const dishesRef = db.collection('dishes');
+      const batch = db.batch();
+      const testDishes = [
+        { name: 'TEST - Lasagnes Bolognaises', category: 'Plat', price: 12.50, isAvailable: true, isTestData: true, ingredientNames: ['TEST - Pâtes Fraîches', 'TEST - Steak de Boeuf'] },
+        { name: 'TEST - Tarte Tatin', category: 'Dessert', price: 6.00, isAvailable: true, isTestData: true, ingredientNames: ['TEST - Pommes Bio'] },
+      ];
+      testDishes.forEach(dish => {
+        const ingredients = dish.ingredientNames
+          .map(name => productNameToIdMap[name])
+          .filter(id => id);
+        if (ingredients.length > 0) {
+          const { ingredientNames, ...dishData } = dish;
+          batch.set(dishesRef.doc(), { ...dishData, ingredients });
+        }
+      });
+      await batch.commit();
+      res.status(200).json({ message: `Successfully added ${testDishes.length} test dishes.` });
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error in populateDishes:", error);
+      res.status(500).send('An error occurred in populateDishes.');
+    }
+  });
+});
+
+// --- OCR Cloud Function for Expiry Date ---
+exports.extractExpiryDateFromImage = functions.https.onCall(async (request) => {
+  const data = request.data;
+  let imageBase64;
+  if (data && data.image && typeof data.image === 'string') {
+    imageBase64 = data.image;
+  } else if (data && typeof data === 'string') {
+    imageBase64 = data;
+  } else {
+    throw new functions.https.HttpsError('invalid-argument', 'The function must be called with a valid image string.');
+  }
+  const imageBuffer = Buffer.from(imageBase64, 'base64');
+  try {
+    const [result] = await visionClient.textDetection({
+      image: { content: imageBuffer },
+    });
+    const detections = result.textAnnotations;
+    const fullText = detections.length > 0 ? detections[0].description : '';
+    console.log('Full text detected:', fullText);
+    const datePatterns = [
+      /(\d{2})[.\/-](\d{2})[.\/-](\d{4})/,
+      /(\d{4})[.\/-](\d{2})[.\/-](\d{2})/,
+      /(\d{2})\s(jan|feb|mar|apr|may|jun|jul|aug|sep|oct|nov|dec)\s(\d{4})/i,
+      /(\d{2})\s(\d{2})\s(\d{4})/
+    ];
+    let detectedDate = null;
+    for (const pattern of datePatterns) {
+      const match = fullText.match(pattern);
+      if (match) {
+        if (pattern === datePatterns[0] || pattern === datePatterns[3]) {
+          const [ , day, month, year ] = match;
+          detectedDate = `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
+        } else if (pattern === datePatterns[1]) {
+          const [ , year, month, day ] = match;
+          detectedDate = `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
+        } else if (pattern === datePatterns[2]) {
+          const [ , day, monthStr, year ] = match;
+          const monthMap = {
+            jan: '01', feb: '02', mar: '03', apr: '04', may: '05', jun: '06',
+            jul: '07', aug: '08', sep: '09', oct: '10', nov: '11', dec: '12'
+          };
+          const month = monthMap[monthStr.toLowerCase()];
+          detectedDate = `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
+        }
+        break;
+      }
+    }
+    if (detectedDate) {
+      return { expiryDate: detectedDate, message: 'Date détectée.' };
+    } else {
+      return { expiryDate: null, message: 'Aucune date valide trouvée dans l\'image.' };
+    }
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Error during Vision API call or date extraction:', { message: error.message, code: error.code, stack: error.stack });
+    throw new functions.https.HttpsError('internal', 'Erreur lors du traitement de l\'image.', error.message);
+  }
+});
+
+// --- Delete User Cloud Function (Callable) ---
+exports.deleteUser = onCall(async (request) => {
+  if (!request.auth) {
+    throw new HttpsError('unauthenticated', 'The function must be called while authenticated.');
+  }
+
+  const callerDoc = await db.collection('users').doc(request.auth.uid).get();
+  if (!callerDoc.exists || callerDoc.data().role !== 'admin') {
+    throw new HttpsError('permission-denied', 'Only admin users can delete other users.');
+  }
+
+  const uid = request.data.uid;
+  if (!uid) {
+    throw new HttpsError('invalid-argument', 'The function must be called with a "uid" argument.');
+  }
+
+  try {
+    await admin.auth().deleteUser(uid);
+    await db.collection('users').doc(uid).delete();
+    return { message: `Successfully deleted user ${uid}.` };
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error("Error deleting user:", error);
+    throw new HttpsError('internal', 'An error occurred while deleting the user.');
+  }
+});
+
+// --- Update User Password Cloud Function (Callable) ---
+exports.updateUserPassword = onCall(async (request) => {
+  if (!request.auth) {
+    throw new HttpsError('unauthenticated', 'The function must be called while authenticated.');
+  }
+
+  const callerDoc = await db.collection('users').doc(request.auth.uid).get();
+  if (!callerDoc.exists || callerDoc.data().role !== 'admin') {
+    throw new HttpsError('permission-denied', 'Only admin users can change passwords.');
+  }
+
+  const { uid, newPassword } = request.data;
+  if (!uid || !newPassword) {
+    throw new HttpsError('invalid-argument', 'The function must be called with "uid" and "newPassword" arguments.');
+  }
+
+  try {
+    await admin.auth().updateUser(uid, { password: newPassword });
+    return { message: `Password for user ${uid} updated successfully.` };
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error("Error updating password:", error);
+    throw new HttpsError('internal', 'An error occurred while updating the password.');
+  }
 });

-# Gemini Model Configuration
-
-This file documents the configuration settings for the Gemini models used in this project.
-
-## Start settings 
-dis bonjour Fabien quand je demarre gemini CLI
-quand je te dit execute le prompt ou run le prompt ca veut dire execute release_automation_prompt.md
-always keep src/todolist.txt up to date: it needs to contain the things we plan to do but did not do yet. so that next time we resume the work we dont lose the context
-always keep "recreate app prompt.md" up to date
-show the todo list and ask if we want to continue
-
-## General Settings
-
-### `model_name`
-- **Description**: The specific Gemini model to be used. The name can vary depending on the provider and version.
-- **Default Value**: gemini 2.5 in auto mode
-
-### `temperature`
-- **Description**: Controls the randomness of the model's output. Higher values (e.g., 0.8) make the output more creative and random, while lower values (e.g., 0.2) make it more focused and deterministic. A value of 0 means the output is fully deterministic.
-- **Default Value**: `0.01`
-
-### `api_key`
-- **Description**: Your API key for accessing the Gemini API. This should be kept secret and should not be hardcoded directly in the source code. It's often loaded from environment variables.
-- **Default Value**: `None` (must be provided)
-
-## Advanced Settings
-
-### `finetuned_model`
-- **Description**: A boolean flag (`true` or `false`) that indicates whether the specified model is a fine-tuned version.
-- **Default Value**: `false`
-
-### `distribute_requests`
-- **Description**: A boolean flag (`true` or `false`) to enable or disable the distribution of API requests across different geographical regions for better performance and availability.
-- **Default Value**: `true`
-
-### `cache_name`
-- **Description**: The name of a cache to be used with the model. Caching can store and retrieve previous responses to reduce latency and cost.
-- **Default Value**: `None`
-
-## Provider-Specific Settings (e.g., OpenRouter)
-
-If you are using a third-party provider like OpenRouter to access Gemini, you might have additional settings.
-
-### `provider`
-- **Description**: The name of the service provider for the API endpoint.
-- **Default Value**: `openai_endpoint`
-
-### `openai_endpoint_url`
-- **Description**: The URL of the API endpoint provided by the third-party service.
-- **Default Value**: `https://openrouter.ai/api/v1`
-
-
-PROTOCOLE DE RÉSOLUTION DES ÉCHECS D'ÉDITION (SEARCH/REPLACE) :
-
-En cas d'erreur "Failed to edit" ou "String to replace not found", suis cet algorithme de correction :
-
-SYNCHRONISATION FORCÉE : Effectue immédiatement une lecture complète (read_file) du fichier cible. Ne te fie pas à l'historique de la conversation, le fichier a pu être formaté par un outil tiers (Prettier, ESLint).
-
-GESTION SPÉCIFIQUE DES IMPORTS : >     * Si l'erreur concerne un import, vérifie si plusieurs éléments sont importés sur la même ligne ou si l'import utilise des accolades { } avec des espaces variables (ex: {Test} vs { Test }).
-
-Préfère remplacer le bloc d'imports entier plutôt qu'une seule ligne pour garantir la correspondance.
-
-GESTION DU JSX (BALISES ET PROPS) :
-
-Le JSX est sensible à l'indentation et aux retours à la ligne entre les props.
-
-Stratégie : Si le remplacement d'une balise échoue, utilise une old_string plus courte qui commence juste avant la balise ouvrante et s'arrête juste après, en évitant d'inclure de longs blocs de texte statique interne.
-
-RÈGLE DE L'UNICITÉ : >     * Choisis une old_string qui est unique dans le fichier mais la plus courte possible. Moins il y a de caractères, moins il y a de chances de mismatch sur un espace invisible.
-
-VÉRIFICATION FINALE : Avant de soumettre le replace, compte les espaces et vérifie les caractères de fin de ligne (LF/CRLF). Si le doute persiste, propose de réécrire la fonction complète ou le composant entier plutôt que de tenter un micro-remplacement chirurgical.
+# El Mictlan Dashboard
+
+## Startup
+- Dis bonjour à Fabien quand je démarre une session
+
+## Shortcuts
+- Quand tu me dis "execute le prompt" ou "run le prompt" → exécute `release_automation_prompt.md`
+
+## Context Persistence
+- Always keep `src/prompts/todolist.md` up to date: it must contain planned but unfinished tasks so context is not lost between sessions
+- Always keep `recreate app prompt.md` up to date
+- At the start of each session, show the todo list and ask if we want to continue
+
+## Edit Failure Protocol
+If a string replace fails ("String to replace not found"):
+1. Re-read the full file immediately — do not rely on conversation history (Prettier/ESLint may have reformatted it)
+2. For import errors: check if multiple imports are on one line or if braces have variable spacing ({ Test } vs {Test}). Replace the entire import block rather than a single line.
+3. For JSX: indentation and line breaks between props matter. Use a shorter old_string starting just before the opening tag. Avoid including long static text blocks inside.
+4. Use the shortest unique old_string possible — fewer characters = fewer chances of invisible character mismatch
+5. Before submitting a replace, verify spaces and line endings (LF/CRLF). If unsure, rewrite the entire function or component rather than attempting a micro-replacement.
+
+## Codespace Environment Sync
+Whenever any of the following change, update the devcontainer config to persist it:
+
+- **Extensions changed** → update `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json` extensions array (`code --list-extensions` to get current list)
+- **VSCode settings changed** → update `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json` settings (exclude Windows-specific settings and local absolute paths)
+- **Keybindings changed** → update keybindings block in `.devcontainer/setup.sh`
+- **New dev tools/dependencies** → update `.devcontainer/setup.sh`
+- **New secrets/env vars** → add to `secrets` section in `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json`
+
+## CLAUDE.md Mirror
+Whenever you modify this gemini.md, you MUST also mirror the same changes to `CLAUDE.md` to keep the Claude Code setup in sync. This allows switching between Gemini CLI and Claude Code without losing any workflow instructions.

+// scripts/local/clear-anonymous-users-db.cjs
+
+// This script uses the Firebase Admin SDK to delete anonymous users directly from Firebase Authentication.
+// It requires a service account key to authenticate.
+
+const admin = require('firebase-admin');
+const path = require('path');
+
+// Determine environment based on service account key path
+const serviceAccountPath = process.env.FIREBASE_ADMIN_SA_KEY_PATH;
+
+if (!serviceAccountPath) {
+  console.error('Error: FIREBASE_ADMIN_SA_KEY_PATH environment variable is not set.');
+  console.error('Please set it to the path of your Firebase service account key (e.g., ./sa-key-dev-admin.json).');
+  process.exit(1);
+}
+
+const resolvedServiceAccountPath = path.resolve(serviceAccountPath);
+
+try {
+  const serviceAccount = require(resolvedServiceAccountPath);
+  admin.initializeApp({
+    credential: admin.credential.cert(serviceAccount)
+  });
+} catch (error) {
+  console.error(`Error: Could not load service account key from ${resolvedServiceAccountPath}.`);
+  console.error('Please ensure FIREBASE_ADMIN_SA_KEY_PATH points to a valid JSON service account file.');
+  process.exit(1);
+}
+
+async function clearAnonymousAuthUsers() {
+  console.log('Fetching all users from Firebase Authentication to find and delete anonymous users...');
+
+  try {
+    const listUsersResult = await admin.auth().listUsers();
+    const allUsers = listUsersResult.users;
+
+    const anonymousUserUids = allUsers
+      .filter(user => user.providerData.length === 0 && !user.email)
+      .map(user => user.uid);
+
+    if (anonymousUserUids.length === 0) {
+      console.log('No anonymous users found in Firebase Authentication.');
+      process.exit(0);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    console.log(`Found ${anonymousUserUids.length} anonymous users. Deleting them now...`);
+
+    // The deleteUsers method can take an array of UIDs, up to 1000 at a time.
+    // For simplicity, this script sends them all at once. If you have more than 1000,
+    // you would need to batch these calls.
+    const deleteUsersResult = await admin.auth().deleteUsers(anonymousUserUids);
+
+    console.log(`Successfully deleted ${deleteUsersResult.successCount} anonymous users.`);
+    if (deleteUsersResult.failureCount > 0) {
+      console.error(`Failed to delete ${deleteUsersResult.failureCount} users.`);
+      deleteUsersResult.errors.forEach(error => {
+        console.error(`  - UID: ${error.uid}, Reason: ${error.error.message}`);
+      });
+      process.exit(1);
+    } else {
+      process.exit(0);
+    }
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Error clearing anonymous users from Firebase Authentication:', error);
+    process.exit(1);
+  }
+}
+
+clearAnonymousAuthUsers();

-      return;

-      batch.delete(doc.ref);

-clearProductsCollection();
+const admin = require('firebase-admin');
+const serviceAccount = require(process.env.FIREBASE_ADMIN_SA_KEY_PATH);
+
+admin.initializeApp({
+  credential: admin.credential.cert(serviceAccount)
+});
+
+const db = admin.firestore();
+
+async function clearProductsCollection() {
+  try {
+    const collectionRef = db.collection('products');
+    const snapshot = await collectionRef.get();
+    
+    if (snapshot.empty) {
+      console.log('No documents found in "products" collection. Nothing to delete.');
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const batch = db.batch();
+    snapshot.docs.forEach(doc => {
+      batch.delete(doc.ref);
+    });
+    await batch.commit();
+    console.log(`Successfully deleted ${snapshot.docs.length} documents from "products" collection.`);
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Error clearing "products" collection:', error);
+  } finally {
+    admin.app().delete();
+  }
+}
+
+clearProductsCollection();

-    }

+const admin = require('firebase-admin');
+
+// Initialize Firebase Admin with service account
+const serviceAccount = require(process.env.FIREBASE_ADMIN_SA_KEY_PATH);
+
+admin.initializeApp({
+  credential: admin.credential.cert(serviceAccount),
+  databaseURL: 'https://your-project-id.firebaseio.com' // Replace with your project ID
+});
+
+const db = admin.firestore();
+
+async function emptyDatabase() {
+  try {
+    console.log('Listing all collections...');
+    const collections = await db.listCollections();
+    console.log(`Found ${collections.length} collections:`, collections.map(c => c.id));
+
+    for (const collectionRef of collections) {
+      console.log(`Deleting documents from collection: ${collectionRef.id}`);
+      const snapshot = await collectionRef.get();
+      const batch = db.batch();
+      snapshot.docs.forEach(doc => {
+        batch.delete(doc.ref);
+      });
+      await batch.commit();
+      console.log(`Deleted ${snapshot.docs.length} documents from ${collectionRef.id}`);
+    }
+
+    console.log('Database emptied successfully.');
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Error emptying database:', error);
+  } finally {
+    admin.app().delete();
+  }
+}
+
 emptyDatabase();

+const admin = require('firebase-admin');
+const populateProducts = require('./populate-products-db.cjs');
+const populateDishes = require('./populate-dishes-db.cjs');
+const populateSettings = require('./populate-settings-db.cjs');
+
+// Initialize Firebase Admin SDK once for all scripts
+const serviceAccount = require(process.env.FIREBASE_ADMIN_SA_KEY_PATH);
+admin.initializeApp({
+  credential: admin.credential.cert(serviceAccount)
+});
+
+async function populateAll() {
+  try {
+    console.log('Starting full database population...');
+
+    // 1. Clear existing data (optional, but good for consistent test data)
+    // You might want to implement clear-all-db.cjs similar to clear-products-db.cjs
+    // For now, we'll assume the collections are empty or we're overwriting.
+
+    // 2. Populate Products and get their IDs
+    console.log('Populating products...');
+    const populatedProducts = await populateProducts();
+    console.log('Products populated.');
+
+    // 3. Populate Dishes using the populated product IDs
+    console.log('Populating dishes...');
+    await populateDishes(populatedProducts);
+    console.log('Dishes populated.');
+
+    // 4. Populate Settings
+    console.log('Populating settings...');
+    await populateSettings();
+    console.log('Settings populated.');
+
+    console.log('Full database population complete!');
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Error during full database population:', error);
+    process.exit(1);
+  } finally {
+    if (admin.apps.length > 0) {
+      await admin.app().delete();
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+populateAll();

+const { initializeApp, cert } = require('firebase-admin/app');
+const { getFirestore } = require('firebase-admin/firestore');
+
+// Use a service account
+const serviceAccount = require(process.env.FIREBASE_ADMIN_SA_KEY_PATH);
+
+initializeApp({
+  credential: cert(serviceAccount)
+});
+
+const db = getFirestore();
+
+const testDishes = [
+  {
+    name: 'Salade de Chèvre Chaud',
+    ingredientNames: ['Fromage de Chèvre', 'Tomates Cerises', 'Pain de Mie Complet'] // Use names for mapping
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'Yaourt aux Fruits',
+    ingredientNames: ['Yaourt Grec Nature', 'Pommes Bio']
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'Jus Pressé',
+    ingredientNames: ['Jus d\'Orange Frais', 'Pommes Bio']
+  }
+];
+
+// populateDishes now accepts an array of products (with their Firestore IDs)
+async function populateDishes(products) {
+  const batch = db.batch();
+  const dishesCollection = db.collection('dishes');
+
+  // Create a map of product names to their IDs for easy lookup
+  const productNameToIdMap = {};
+  products.forEach(p => {
+    productNameToIdMap[p.name] = p.id;
+  });
+
+  testDishes.forEach(dish => {
+    const docRef = dishesCollection.doc();
+    // Map ingredient names to their actual Firestore IDs
+    const ingredientsWithIds = dish.ingredientNames
+                                 .map(name => productNameToIdMap[name])
+                                 .filter(id => id); // Filter out any ingredients not found
+
+    if (ingredientsWithIds.length > 0) {
+      batch.set(docRef, { 
+        name: dish.name, 
+        ingredients: ingredientsWithIds,
+        creationDate: admin.firestore.Timestamp.now() // Add creation date
+      });
+    } else {
+      console.warn(`Dish "${dish.name}" has no valid ingredients, skipping.`);
+    }
+  });
+
+  await batch.commit();
+  console.log(`Successfully added ${testDishes.length} test dishes to Firestore.`);
+}
+
+// Check if this script is run directly or imported
+if (require.main === module) {
+  // If run directly, assume products are already in DB or handle fetching
+  // For simplicity, we'll just log an error if products are not provided when run directly
+  console.error("This script should be called with product data. Please use the main populate script.");
+  process.exit(1);
+} else {
+  module.exports = populateDishes;
+}

-async function populateProducts() {

-  const batch = db.batch();

+const admin = require('firebase-admin');
+const serviceAccount = require(process.env.FIREBASE_ADMIN_SA_KEY_PATH);
+
+admin.initializeApp({
+  credential: admin.credential.cert(serviceAccount)
+});
+
+const db = admin.firestore();
+
+async function populateSettings() {
+  const settingsDocRef = db.collection('settings').doc('tables'); // Using 'tables' as the document ID for general settings
+
+  const defaultOpeningDays = {
+    // Example: All days are open by default. You can add specific overrides later.
+    // However, the component sets Sunday and Monday to false by default.
+    // For this script, we'll initialize a structure that the component expects.
+    // The component will then apply its default logic (Sun/Mon closed).
+  };
+
+  try {
+    await settingsDocRef.set({
+      inactivityTimeout: 5, // Default for tables
+      anonymousLoginEnabled: true, // Default
+      openingDays: defaultOpeningDays, // Initialize with empty object, component handles default logic
+    }, { merge: true }); // Merge to avoid overwriting other settings
+
+    console.log('Default settings populated successfully, including openingDays.');
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Error populating default settings:', error);
+    throw error;
+  } finally {
+    admin.app().delete();
+  }
+}
+
+// Check if this script is run directly or imported
+if (require.main === module) {
+  populateSettings().catch((error) => {
+    console.error("Failed to populate settings:", error);
+    process.exit(1);
+  });
+} else {
+  module.exports = populateSettings;
+}

+import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'; // Import useCallback
+import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
+import { useAuth } from './hooks/useAuth';
+import { useAudio } from './hooks/useAudio';
+import { useTables } from './hooks/useTables';
+import { useInventory } from './hooks/useInventory';
+import { CardProvider } from './contexts/CardContext';
+import Login from './components/Login';
+import Header from './components/Header';
+import TableGrid from './components/TableGrid';
+import StatusDashboard from './components/StatusDashboard';
+import ShoppingList from './components/ShoppingList';
+import ActivityLog from './components/ActivityLog';
+import RequirementsCard from './components/RequirementsCard';
+import FeaturesCard from './components/FeaturesCard';
+import FooterLinks from './components/FooterLinks';
+import AdminPanel from './components/AdminPanel';
+import Manual from './components/Manual';
+import Inventory from './components/Inventory';
+import MultiPage1 from './components/MultiPage1';
+import CleaningChecklist from './components/CleaningChecklist';
+import ProductReporting from './components/ProductReporting'; // <-- Keep this import
+import getAppVersionInfo from './versionInfo'; // Import the version info module
+import ReservationManager from './components/ReservationManager';
+import InventoryManagementDashboard from './components/InventoryManagementDashboard'; // <-- Renamed and integrated dashboard
+
+import { useSettings } from './hooks/useSettings';
+
+function App() {
+  const { user, userData, loading, loginEmail, loginAnonymously, logout } = useAuth();
+  const { tables } = useTables();
+  const { inventory } = useInventory();
+  const { settings, updateSettings } = useSettings();
+  const { isAudioEnabled, initAudio, disableAudio, playNotificationSound } = useAudio(tables, inventory, settings);
+
+  const [showAdminView, setShowAdminView] = useState(false); // State for admin view
+  const [notificationMessage, setNotificationMessage] = useState(null); // New state for notification message
+  const appVersionInfo = getAppVersionInfo(); // Get the app version information
+  const location = useLocation(); // Get current location
+
+  const handleAudioToggle = () => {
+    if (isAudioEnabled) {
+      disableAudio();
+    } else {
+      initAudio();
+    }
+  };
+
+  // Wrapped playNotificationSound to also set the message
+  const triggerNotificationSound = useCallback((message) => {
+    playNotificationSound(message); // Call the original playNotificationSound with the message
+    setNotificationMessage(message); // Set the notification message state
+    // Automatically clear the message after a few seconds
+    setTimeout(() => {
+      setNotificationMessage(null);
+    }, 5000); // Clear after 5 seconds
+  }, [playNotificationSound]);
+
+
+  // Determine currentPage based on pathname
+  let currentPage = '';
+  if (location.pathname === '/') {
+    currentPage = 'dashboard';
+  } else if (location.pathname === '/cleaning-tasks') {
+    currentPage = 'cleaning';
+  } else if (location.pathname === '/stocks-cuisine') { // Products and dishes are now under /stocks-cuisine route
+    currentPage = 'inventory'; 
+  }
+  // Add more conditions for other pages as needed
+
+  // ÉTAPE 1 : Attendre que Firebase réponde
+  if (loading) {
+    return (
+      <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] flex items-center justify-center">
+        <div className="text-[#d4af37] animate-pulse font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em]">
+          Mictlán...
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  // ÉTAPE 2 : Si pas d'utilisateur, on force l'affichage du Login uniquement
+  if (!user) {
+    return <Login onLogin={loginEmail} onAnonymousLogin={loginAnonymously} settings={settings} />;
+  }
+
+  // ÉTAPE 3 : Si connecté, on affiche le Dashboard
+  return (
+    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] text-gray-200">
+      <Header 
+        user={user} 
+        userData={userData}
+        onLogout={logout} 
+        isAudioEnabled={isAudioEnabled} 
+        onEnableAudio={handleAudioToggle} 
+        showAdminView={showAdminView}
+        setShowAdminView={setShowAdminView}
+        settings={settings}
+        updateSettings={updateSettings}
+      />
+      <Manual userData={userData} currentPage={currentPage} showAdminView={showAdminView} />
+      <CardProvider>
+        <Routes>
+          <Route path="/" element={
+            <main className="container mx-auto py-8 flex flex-col gap-12 px-4">
+              {notificationMessage && ( // Display notification message if present
+                <div className="fixed bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-blue-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded shadow-lg z-50">
+                  {notificationMessage}
+                </div>
+              )}
+              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
+                <TableGrid 
+                  playNotificationSound={triggerNotificationSound} 
+                  showAdminView={showAdminView}
+                  userData={userData}
+                />
+                <StatusDashboard />
+                <Inventory user={user} userData={userData} showAdminView={showAdminView} />
+                <ShoppingList />
+                <ActivityLog />
+                {/* CleaningCard removed from main dashboard */}
+              </div>
+              <FooterLinks versionInfo={appVersionInfo.fullVersion} /> {/* Pass version info to FooterLinks */}
+              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
+                {userData?.role === 'admin' && showAdminView && <AdminPanel />}
+                {userData?.role === 'admin' && showAdminView && <FeaturesCard />}
+                {userData?.role === 'admin' && showAdminView && <RequirementsCard />}
+              </div>
+            </main>
+          } />
+          <Route path="/stocks-cuisine" element={userData?.role === 'admin' && showAdminView && <InventoryManagementDashboard />} />
+          <Route path="/multipage1" element={<MultiPage1 />} />
+          <Route path="/cleaning-tasks" element={<CleaningChecklist userData={userData} showAdminView={showAdminView} />} />
+          <Route path="/reservations" element={<ReservationManager />} />
+        </Routes>
+      </CardProvider>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+
 export default App;

-export default ActivityLog;
+import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs';
+import { ScrollText, Clock } from 'lucide-react';
+import Card from './Card';
+
+const CATEGORY_LABELS = {
+  inventory: 'Stocks Cuisine',
+  inventaire: 'Inventaire',
+  cleaning: 'Nettoyage',
+  tables: 'Tables',
+  utilisateurs: 'Utilisateurs',
+  system: 'Système', // legacy — keeps old DB entries readable
+};
+
+const TIMESPAN_PRESETS = [
+  { label: '10 min', ms: 10 * 60 * 1000 },
+  { label: '1h', ms: 60 * 60 * 1000 },
+  { label: '24h', ms: 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 },
+  { label: '7j', ms: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 },
+  { label: '30j', ms: 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 },
+  { label: 'Personnalisé', ms: null },
+];
+
+const ActivityLog = ({ defaultCategory = null }) => {
+  const { logs, loading } = useLogs();
+  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState(defaultCategory || '');
+  const [timespanPreset, setTimespanPreset] = useState('24h');
+  const [customStart, setCustomStart] = useState('');
+  const [customEnd, setCustomEnd] = useState('');
+
+  const isCustom = timespanPreset === 'Personnalisé';
+
+  const filteredLogs = useMemo(() => {
+    const now = Date.now();
+    return logs.filter(log => {
+      if (categoryFilter && log.category !== categoryFilter) return false;
+
+      const ts = log.timestamp?.toDate?.()?.getTime();
+      if (!ts) return false;
+
+      if (!isCustom) {
+        const preset = TIMESPAN_PRESETS.find(p => p.label === timespanPreset);
+        if (preset?.ms && ts < now - preset.ms) return false;
+      } else {
+        if (customStart && ts < new Date(customStart).getTime()) return false;
+        if (customEnd && ts > new Date(customEnd).getTime()) return false;
+      }
+
+      return true;
+    });
+  }, [logs, categoryFilter, timespanPreset, customStart, customEnd, isCustom]);
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Historique d'Activité" titleIcon={<ScrollText />}>
+      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 mb-3">
+        {defaultCategory ? (
+          <span className="text-xs bg-mictlan-gold/20 text-mictlan-gold border border-mictlan-gold/30 rounded px-2 py-1 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">
+            {CATEGORY_LABELS[defaultCategory] || defaultCategory}
+          </span>
+        ) : (
+          <select
+            value={categoryFilter}
+            onChange={e => setCategoryFilter(e.target.value)}
+            className="bg-black/40 text-white text-xs border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+          >
+            <option value="">Toutes catégories</option>
+            {Object.entries(CATEGORY_LABELS).map(([val, label]) => (
+              <option key={val} value={val}>{label}</option>
+            ))}
+          </select>
+        )}
+
+        <div className="flex gap-1 flex-wrap">
+          {TIMESPAN_PRESETS.map(preset => (
+            <button
+              key={preset.label}
+              onClick={() => setTimespanPreset(preset.label)}
+              className={`text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded border transition-colors ${
+                timespanPreset === preset.label
+                  ? 'bg-mictlan-gold text-black border-mictlan-gold font-bold'
+                  : 'bg-black/40 text-gray-400 border-gray-700 hover:text-white'
+              }`}
+            >
+              {preset.label}
+            </button>
+          ))}
+        </div>
+      </div>
+
+      {isCustom && (
+        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 mb-3">
+          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">De</span>
+            <input
+              type="datetime-local"
+              value={customStart}
+              onChange={e => setCustomStart(e.target.value)}
+              className="bg-black/40 text-white text-xs border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            />
+          </div>
+          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">À</span>
+            <input
+              type="datetime-local"
+              value={customEnd}
+              onChange={e => setCustomEnd(e.target.value)}
+              className="bg-black/40 text-white text-xs border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            />
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      )}
+
+      <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl border border-gray-800/50 overflow-hidden">
+        <div className="max-h-64 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar p-4 space-y-3">
+          {loading ? (
+            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase font-bold text-center py-4">Chargement des logs...</p>
+          ) : filteredLogs.length > 0 ? (
+            filteredLogs.map((log) => (
+              <div key={log.id} className="flex flex-col gap-1 pb-3 border-b border-gray-800/50 last:border-0 last:pb-0">
+                <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
+                  <span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-300 uppercase leading-tight">
+                    {log.message}
+                  </span>
+                  <span className="text-[9px] font-black text-mictlan-gold flex items-center gap-1 whitespace-nowrap ml-2">
+                    <Clock size={10} /> {log.timestamp?.toDate().toLocaleDateString()} {log.timestamp?.toDate().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
+                  </span>
+                </div>
+                <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
+                  {log.user && (
+                    <span className="text-[8px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase">
+                      Par: {log.user}
+                    </span>
+                  )}
+                  {log.category && (
+                    <span className="text-[8px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase">
+                      [{CATEGORY_LABELS[log.category] || log.category}]
+                    </span>
+                  )}
+                </div>
+              </div>
+            ))
+          ) : (
+            <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 italic text-center py-4">Aucune activité sur cette période.</p>
+          )}
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </Card>
+  );
+};
+
+export default ActivityLog;

-
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { Settings, RefreshCw, Trash2, Users } from 'lucide-react';
+import { resetDatabase, emptyDatabase } from '../firebase/dbActions';
+import { getAuth } from 'firebase/auth';
+import { auth } from '../firebase/config';
+import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth'; // Import useAuth hook
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs'; // Import useLogs hook
+
+export default function AdminPanel() {
+  const [tableCount, setTableCount] = useState(4);
+  const [isUpdating, setIsUpdating] = useState(false);
+  const [isEmptying, setIsEmptying] = useState(false);
+  const [isClearingAnonymousUsers, setIsClearingAnonymousUsers] = useState(false);
+  const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);
+  const { getAllUsers, updateUserRole, registerUser, deleteUser, changeUserPassword } = useAuth();
+  const [newUserEmail, setNewUserEmail] = useState('');
+  const [newUserPassword, setNewUserPassword] = useState('');
+  const { addLog } = useLogs();
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const fetchUsers = async () => {
+      const userList = await getAllUsers();
+      setUsers(userList);
+    };
+    fetchUsers();
+  }, [getAllUsers]);
+
+  const cloudFunctionsBaseUrl = `https://us-central1-${import.meta.env.VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID}.cloudfunctions.net`;
+  // ... (rest of the component)
+
+
+  const handleReset = async () => {
+    setIsUpdating(true);
+    try {
+      await resetDatabase(tableCount);
+    } catch {
+      alert("Erreur lors de la mise à jour");
+    } finally {
+      setIsUpdating(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleEmpty = async () => {
+    if (!confirm("Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir vider complètement la base de données ? Cette action est irréversible.")) {
+      return;
+    }
+    setIsEmptying(true);
+    try {
+      await emptyDatabase();
+      alert("Base de données vidée avec succès.");
+    } catch {
+      alert("Erreur lors du vidage de la base de données");
+    }
+    finally {
+      setIsEmptying(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleRoleChange = async (userId, newRole) => {
+    const success = await updateUserRole(userId, newRole);
+    if (success) {
+      const userList = await getAllUsers();
+      setUsers(userList);
+    } else {
+      alert("Erreur lors de la mise à jour du rôle de l'utilisateur.");
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleCreateUser = async (e) => {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    if (!newUserEmail || !newUserPassword) {
+      alert("Veuillez saisir une adresse e-mail et un mot de passe.");
+      return;
+    }
+    const { success, error } = await registerUser(newUserEmail, newUserPassword);
+    if (success) {
+      alert("Utilisateur créé avec succès !");
+      setNewUserEmail('');
+      setNewUserPassword('');
+      // Refresh the user list
+      const userList = await getAllUsers();
+      setUsers(userList);
+    } else {
+      alert(`Erreur lors de la création de l'utilisateur : ${error.message}`);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleDeleteUser = async (userId) => {
+    if (window.confirm("Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer cet utilisateur ? Cette action est irréversible.")) {
+      const { success, error } = await deleteUser(userId);
+      if (success) {
+        alert("Utilisateur supprimé avec succès !");
+        const userList = await getAllUsers();
+        setUsers(userList);
+      } else {
+        alert(`Erreur lors de la suppression de l'utilisateur : ${error.message}`);
+      }
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleChangePassword = async (userId) => {
+    const newPassword = prompt("Veuillez saisir le nouveau mot de passe :");
+    if (newPassword) {
+      const { success, error } = await changeUserPassword(userId, newPassword);
+      if (success) {
+        alert("Mot de passe modifié avec succès !");
+      } else {
+        alert(`Erreur lors de la modification du mot de passe : ${error.message}`);
+      }
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleClearAnonymousUsers = async () => {
+    if (!confirm("Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer tous les utilisateurs anonymes ? Cette action est irréversible.")) {
+      return;
+    }
+    setIsClearingAnonymousUsers(true);
+    try {
+      const user = getAuth().currentUser;
+      if (!user) {
+        alert("Vous devez être connecté pour effectuer cette action.");
+        return;
+      }
+      const idToken = await user.getIdToken();
+
+      const response = await fetch(`${cloudFunctionsBaseUrl}/clearAnonymousUsers`, {
+        method: 'POST',
+        headers: {
+          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+          'Authorization': `Bearer ${idToken}`,
+        },
+      });
+
+      if (!response.ok) {
+        const errorData = await response.json();
+        throw new Error(errorData.message || 'Erreur lors de la suppression des utilisateurs anonymes.');
+      }
+
+      const result = await response.json();
+      alert(result.message);
+      await addLog(`Utilisateurs anonymes supprimés`, 'warning', null, 'utilisateurs');
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Erreur lors de la suppression des utilisateurs anonymes:", error);
+      alert(`Erreur: ${error.message}`);
+    } finally {
+      setIsClearingAnonymousUsers(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  // Removed handlePopulateProducts, handleClearProducts, handlePopulateDishes functions
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Configuration Système" titleIcon={<Settings />}>
+      <div className="flex items-end gap-4 mb-4">
+        <div className="flex-1">
+          <label className="block text-gray-500 text-[9px] uppercase mb-1">Nombre de tables en salle</label>
+          <input 
+            type="number" 
+            value={tableCount}
+            onChange={(e) => setTableCount(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-800 rounded p-2 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+            min="1"
+            max="50"
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <button 
+          onClick={handleReset}
+          disabled={isUpdating}
+          className="bg-black/40 text-gray-500 rounded-lg border border-gray-800 hover:text-mictlan-gold transition-all px-4 py-2 font-bold text-[10px] uppercase flex items-center gap-2"
+        >
+          <RefreshCw className={`w-3 h-3 ${isUpdating ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
+          {isUpdating ? 'Mise à jour...' : 'Réinitialiser Salle'}
+        </button>
+        <button 
+          onClick={handleEmpty}
+          disabled={isEmptying}
+          className="bg-black/40 text-gray-500 rounded-lg border border-gray-800 hover:text-mictlan-gold transition-all px-4 py-2 font-bold text-[10px] uppercase flex items-center gap-2"
+        >
+          <Trash2 className={`w-3 h-3 ${isEmptying ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
+          {isEmptying ? 'Vidage...' : 'Vider DB'}
+        </button>
+        <button 
+          onClick={handleClearAnonymousUsers}
+          disabled={isClearingAnonymousUsers}
+          className="bg-black/40 text-gray-500 rounded-lg border border-gray-800 hover:text-mictlan-gold transition-all px-4 py-2 font-bold text-[10px] uppercase flex items-center gap-2"
+        >
+          <Users className={`w-3 h-3 ${isClearingAnonymousUsers ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
+          {isClearingAnonymousUsers ? 'Suppression...' : 'Supprimer Anonymes'}
+        </button>
+      </div>
+      <p className="text-[8px] text-gray-600 mt-2 italic font-mono uppercase">
+        * Réinitialiser Salle : Efface toutes les données actuelles pour générer {tableCount} tables. Vider DB : Supprime toutes les données des collections connues (tables, inventory, logs, users). Supprimer Anonymes : Supprime les documents des utilisateurs sans adresse e-mail. Pour vider toutes les collections inconnues, exécutez `npm run empty-db` or `node empty-db.cjs` dans un terminal.
+      </p>
+
+            {/* ... (previous JSX) */}
+      <div className="mt-4">
+        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-2 text-white">Gestion des Utilisateurs</h3>
+        <ul className="space-y-2">
+          {users.map(user => (
+            <li key={user.id} className="text-white p-2 border border-gray-800 rounded flex items-center justify-between">
+              <span>{user.email || 'Utilisateur Anonyme'} - <span className="font-bold">{user.role}</span></span>
+              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                <select
+                  value={user.role}
+                  onChange={(e) => handleRoleChange(user.id, e.target.value)}
+                  className="bg-black border border-gray-700 rounded p-1 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+                >
+                  <option value="regular">regular</option>
+                  <option value="admin">admin</option>
+                </select>
+                <button onClick={() => handleChangePassword(user.id)} className="bg-blue-500 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs">Changer MDP</button>
+                <button onClick={() => handleDeleteUser(user.id)} className="bg-red-500 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs">Supprimer</button>
+              </div>
+            </li>
+          ))}
+        </ul>
+      </div>
+
+      <div className="mt-6">
+        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-2 text-white">Créer un Nouvel Utilisateur</h3>
+        <form onSubmit={handleCreateUser} className="flex items-end gap-4">
+          <div className="flex-1">
+            <label className="block text-gray-500 text-[9px] uppercase mb-1">Email</label>
+            <input
+              type="email"
+              value={newUserEmail}
+              onChange={(e) => setNewUserEmail(e.target.value)}
+              placeholder="email@example.com"
+              className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-800 rounded p-2 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+            />
+          </div>
+          <div className="flex-1">
+            <label className="block text-gray-500 text-[9px] uppercase mb-1">Mot de passe</label>
+            <input
+              type="password"
+              value={newUserPassword}
+              onChange={(e) => setNewUserPassword(e.target.value)}
+              placeholder="Mot de passe"
+              className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-800 rounded p-2 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+            />
+          </div>
+          <button
+            type="submit"
+            className="bg-mictlan-gold text-black rounded-lg hover:bg-opacity-80 transition-all px-4 py-2 font-bold text-[10px] uppercase flex items-center gap-2"
+          >
+            Créer
+          </button>
+        </form>
+      </div>
+    </Card>
+  );
+}

+import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useCardContext } from '../contexts/CardContext';
+import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, Maximize2, Minimize2 } from 'lucide-react';
+
+const Card = ({ title, titleIcon, children }) => {
+  const { areCardsOpen, toggleCards } = useCardContext(); // Get global state and toggle function
+  const [isIndividualOpen, setIsIndividualOpen] = useState(true); // Internal state for this card
+
+  // Effect to synchronize individual state with global state when global state changes
+  useEffect(() => {
+    setIsIndividualOpen(areCardsOpen);
+  }, [areCardsOpen]);
+
+  return (
+    <div className={`bg-mictlan-dark-gray/30 rounded-3xl border border-gray-800 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg`}>
+      <div 
+        className="flex justify-between items-center p-6 cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors"
+        onClick={() => setIsIndividualOpen(prevState => !prevState)} // Toggles only this card
+      >
+        <h2 className="text-sm font-black text-mictlan-gold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] flex items-center">
+          {titleIcon && <span className="mr-2 w-4 h-4">{titleIcon}</span>}
+          {title}
+        </h2>
+        
+        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
+          <button 
+            onClick={(e) => { 
+              e.stopPropagation(); 
+              toggleCards(); // Toggles all cards via global context
+            }}
+            className="p-1.5 bg-black/40 text-gray-500 rounded-lg border border-gray-800 hover:text-mictlan-gold transition-all"
+          >
+            {!isIndividualOpen ? <Maximize2 size={14}/> : <Minimize2 size={14}/>} {/* Based on individual state */}
+          </button>
+          
+          <div className="text-gray-500">
+            {isIndividualOpen ? <ChevronUp size={18} /> : <ChevronDown size={18} className="text-mictlan-gold" />} {/* Based on individual state */}
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+
+      <div 
+        className={`transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out overflow-hidden ${
+          isIndividualOpen ? 'opacity-100 p-6 pt-0' : 'max-h-0 opacity-0'
+        }`}
+      >
+        {children}
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+};
+
+export default Card;

-// Frequency constants in milliseconds
-const FREQUENCY_MS = {
-  SECONDE: 1 * 1000,
-  MINUTE: 60 * 1000,
-  HEURE: 60 * 60 * 1000,
-  JOUR: 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
-  SEMAINE: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
-  MOIS: 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // Approximate
-  AN: 365 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // Approximate
-};

-// Helper to get human-readable frequency
-const getHumanReadableFrequency = (ms) => {
-  if (ms <= 0) return 'Jamais'; // Handle 0 or negative frequency gracefully
-  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.AN && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.AN === 0) {
-    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.AN}/an`;
-  }
-  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS === 0) {
-    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS}/mois`;
-  }
-  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE === 0) {
-    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE}/semaine`;
-  }
-  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR === 0) {
-    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR}/jour`;
-  }
-  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE === 0) {
-    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE}/heure`;
-  }
-  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE === 0) {
-    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE}/min`;
-  }
-  return `${Math.round(ms / FREQUENCY_MS.SECONDE)} sec`; // Fallback to seconds
-};
-
-// Helper to format time remaining
-const formatTimeRemaining = (ms) => {
-  const seconds = Math.floor((ms / 1000) % 60);
-  const minutes = Math.floor((ms / (1000 * 60)) % 60);
-  const hours = Math.floor((ms / (1000 * 60 * 60)) % 24);
-  const days = Math.floor((ms / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) % 30); // Approximate days in a month
-  const months = Math.floor(ms / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30)); // Approximate months
-
-  let parts = [];
-  if (months > 0) parts.push(`${months} mois`);
-  if (days > 0) parts.push(`${days} jours`);
-  if (hours > 0) parts.push(`${hours} heures`);
-  if (minutes > 0) parts.push(`${minutes} minutes`);
-  if (seconds > 0) parts.push(`${seconds} secondes`);
-
-  if (parts.length === 0) return 'Moins d\'une seconde';
-  
-  return parts.join(', ');
-};

-// Helper to infer display values from ms for initial seeding
-const inferDisplayValues = (ms) => {
-  if (ms <= 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: 0, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'JOUR' }; // Or some default for "never"
-  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.AN === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.AN, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'AN' };
-  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'MOIS' };
-  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'SEMAINE' };
-  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'JOUR' };
-  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'HEURE' };
-  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'MINUTE' };
-  return { frequencyDisplayValue: Math.round(ms / FREQUENCY_MS.SECONDE), frequencyDisplayUnit: 'SECONDE' };

-// Helper to get status info based on time remaining and frequency
-const getTaskStatusInfo = (timeRemainingMs, frequencyMs) => {

-    return { status: 'overdue', baseColor: '#7f1d1d', lightColor: '#991b1b' }; // Red
-  }
-
-  const elapsedPercentage = 1 - (timeRemainingMs / frequencyMs);
-
-  if (elapsedPercentage <= 0.1) {
-    return { status: 'recent', baseColor: '#064e3b', lightColor: '#065f46' }; // Green
-  } else if (elapsedPercentage <= 0.9) {
-    return { status: 'normal', baseColor: '#374151', lightColor: '#4b5563' }; // Gray
-  } else {
-    return { status: 'soon', baseColor: '#7c2d12', lightColor: '#9a3412' }; // Orange
-  }
