+import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth';
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs';
+import ActivityLog from './ActivityLog';
+import { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import {
+  collection,
+  query,
+  onSnapshot,
+  addDoc,
+  Timestamp,
+  orderBy,
+  updateDoc,
+  doc as firestoreDoc, // Alias doc to avoid conflict with react 'doc'
+  getDocs,
+  writeBatch,
+  deleteDoc,
+  where, // Add where for category query
+  setDoc // Add setDoc for explicit document creation
+} from 'firebase/firestore';
+import HistoryModal from './HistoryModal';
+import { History, PlusCircle, Trash2, Filter } from 'lucide-react'; // Added PlusCircle, Trash2, Filter icon
+
+// Frequency constants in milliseconds
+const FREQUENCY_MS = {
+  SECONDE: 1 * 1000,
+  MINUTE: 60 * 1000,
+  HEURE: 60 * 60 * 1000,
+  JOUR: 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
+  SEMAINE: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
+  MOIS: 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // Approximate
+  AN: 365 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // Approximate
+};
+
+// Helper to get human-readable frequency
+const getHumanReadableFrequency = (ms) => {
+  if (ms <= 0) return 'Jamais'; // Handle 0 or negative frequency gracefully
+  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.AN && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.AN === 0) {
+    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.AN}/an`;
+  }
+  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS === 0) {
+    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS}/mois`;
+  }
+  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE === 0) {
+    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE}/semaine`;
+  }
+  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR === 0) {
+    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR}/jour`;
+  }
+  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE === 0) {
+    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE}/heure`;
+  }
+  if (ms >= FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE && ms % FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE === 0) {
+    return `${ms / FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE}/min`;
+  }
+  return `${Math.round(ms / FREQUENCY_MS.SECONDE)} sec`; // Fallback to seconds
+};
+
+// Helper to format time remaining
+const formatTimeRemaining = (ms) => {
+  const seconds = Math.floor((ms / 1000) % 60);
+  const minutes = Math.floor((ms / (1000 * 60)) % 60);
+  const hours = Math.floor((ms / (1000 * 60 * 60)) % 24);
+  const days = Math.floor((ms / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) % 30); // Approximate days in a month
+  const months = Math.floor(ms / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30)); // Approximate months
+
+  let parts = [];
+  if (months > 0) parts.push(`${months} mois`);
+  if (days > 0) parts.push(`${days} jours`);
+  if (hours > 0) parts.push(`${hours} heures`);
+  if (minutes > 0) parts.push(`${minutes} minutes`);
+  if (seconds > 0) parts.push(`${seconds} secondes`);
+
+  if (parts.length === 0) return 'Moins d\'une seconde';
+  
+  return parts.join(', ');
+};
+
+// Helper to infer display values from ms for initial seeding
+const inferDisplayValues = (ms) => {
+  if (ms <= 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: 0, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'JOUR' }; // Or some default for "never"
+  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.AN === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.AN, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'AN' };
+  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.MOIS, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'MOIS' };
+  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.SEMAINE, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'SEMAINE' };
+  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'JOUR' };
+  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.HEURE, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'HEURE' };
+  if (ms % FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE === 0) return { frequencyDisplayValue: ms / FREQUENCY_MS.MINUTE, frequencyDisplayUnit: 'MINUTE' };
+  return { frequencyDisplayValue: Math.round(ms / FREQUENCY_MS.SECONDE), frequencyDisplayUnit: 'SECONDE' };
+};
+
+// Helper to get status info based on time remaining and frequency
+const getTaskStatusInfo = (timeRemainingMs, frequencyMs) => {
+  if (timeRemainingMs <= 0) {
+    return { status: 'overdue', baseColor: '#7f1d1d', lightColor: '#991b1b' }; // Red
+  }
+
+  const elapsedPercentage = 1 - (timeRemainingMs / frequencyMs);
+
+  if (elapsedPercentage <= 0.1) {
+    return { status: 'recent', baseColor: '#064e3b', lightColor: '#065f46' }; // Green
+  } else if (elapsedPercentage <= 0.9) {
+    return { status: 'normal', baseColor: '#374151', lightColor: '#4b5563' }; // Gray
+  } else {
+    return { status: 'soon', baseColor: '#7c2d12', lightColor: '#9a3412' }; // Orange
+  }
+};
+
+const initialTasksForSeeding = {
+  toilettes: {
+    title: 'Toilettes',
+    points: [
+      { id: 't1', name: 'Cuvette', frequency: 3600000 * 2, ...inferDisplayValues(3600000 * 2) }, // 2 hours -> 1/2 heure
+      { id: 't2', name: 'Sol', frequency: 3600000 * 4, ...inferDisplayValues(3600000 * 4) }, // 4 hours -> 1/4 heure
+      { id: 't3', name: 'Surfaces', frequency: 3600000 * 2, ...inferDisplayValues(3600000 * 2) }, // 2 hours -> 1/2 heure
+      { id: 't4', name: 'Poignée', frequency: 3600000, ...inferDisplayValues(3600000) }, // 1 hour -> 1/1 heure
+    ],
+    refills: [
+      { id: 'tr1', name: 'Savon', frequency: 86400000, ...inferDisplayValues(86400000) }, // 24 hours -> 1/1 jour
+      { id: 'tr2', name: 'Papier', frequency: 86400000, ...inferDisplayValues(86400000) }, // 24 hours -> 1/1 jour
+      { id: 'tr3', name: 'PQ', frequency: 86400000, ...inferDisplayValues(86400000) }, // 24 hours -> 1/1 jour
+      { id: 'tr4', name: 'Serviette hygiénique', frequency: 86400000, ...inferDisplayValues(86400000) }, // 24 hours -> 1/1 jour
+    ],
+  },
+  barCuisine: {
+    title: 'Bar & Cuisine',
+    points: [
+      { id: 'bc1', name: 'Grille de la hotte', frequency: 604800000, ...inferDisplayValues(604800000) }, // 7 days -> 1/1 semaine
+      { id: 'bc2', name: 'Murs', frequency: 2592000000, ...inferDisplayValues(2592000000) }, // 30 days -> 1/1 mois
+      { id: 'bc3', name: "Système d'aspiration", frequency: 31536000000, ...inferDisplayValues(31536000000) }, // 365 days -> 1/1 an
+    ],
+  },
+};
+
+// --- ChecklistItem Component ---
+function ChecklistItem({ item, onLogEvent, onShowHistory, isDone, log, isAdmin, onFrequencyChange, onDeleteTask, nextDueDate, timeRemainingMs, onNameChange }) {
+  const displayTimestamp = log?.timestamp?.toDate ? log.timestamp.toDate() : null;
+  const [editingFrequency, setEditingFrequency] = useState(false);
+  const [editingFrequencyValue, setEditingFrequencyValue] = useState(item.frequencyDisplayValue || 1);
+  const [editingFrequencyUnit, setEditingFrequencyUnit] = useState(item.frequencyDisplayUnit || 'HEURE');
+
+  const [editingName, setEditingName] = useState(false); // New state for editing name
+  const [editingNameValue, setEditingNameValue] = useState(item.name); // New state for editing name value
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    // Initialize value and unit from stored display values
+    setEditingFrequencyValue(item.frequencyDisplayValue || 1);
+    setEditingFrequencyUnit(item.frequencyDisplayUnit || 'HEURE');
+  }, [item.frequencyDisplayValue, item.frequencyDisplayUnit]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    // Initialize name value
+    setEditingNameValue(item.name);
+  }, [item.name]);
+
+  const handleFrequencySave = () => {
+    if (editingFrequencyValue <= 0) {
+      alert("La fréquence doit être un nombre positif.");
+      return;
+    }
+    const newFrequencyMs = FREQUENCY_MS[editingFrequencyUnit] / editingFrequencyValue; // Use division
+    onFrequencyChange(item.id, newFrequencyMs, editingFrequencyValue, editingFrequencyUnit); // Pass display values
+    setEditingFrequency(false);
+  };
+
+  const handleNameSave = () => {
+    if (!editingNameValue.trim()) {
+      alert("Le nom de la tâche ne peut pas être vide.");
+      return;
+    }
+    onNameChange(item.id, editingNameValue.trim());
+    setEditingName(false);
+  };
+
+  const statusInfo = getTaskStatusInfo(timeRemainingMs, item.frequency);
+  const elapsedPercentage = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, 1 - (timeRemainingMs / item.frequency)));
+  const progressPercent = elapsedPercentage * 100;
+
+  // Background style with gradient to show progress
+  const backgroundStyle = {
+    background: `linear-gradient(to right, ${statusInfo.baseColor} ${progressPercent}%, ${statusInfo.lightColor} ${progressPercent}%)`
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <div 
+      className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm border border-white/5"
+      style={backgroundStyle}
+    >
+      <div className="flex-1 mr-2">
+        {editingName ? (
+          <input
+            type="text"
+            value={editingNameValue}
+            onChange={(e) => setEditingNameValue(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-800 rounded p-1 text-white text-xs outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+          />
+        ) : (
+          item.name
+        )}{' '}
+        {item.frequencyDisplayValue && item.frequencyDisplayUnit
+          ? `(${item.frequencyDisplayValue}/${item.frequencyDisplayUnit.toLowerCase()})`
+          : getHumanReadableFrequency(item.frequency)}
+      </div>
+      
+      <div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-1 text-xs text-gray-200 mr-2 font-medium text-right min-w-[150px]">
+        <span>{timeRemainingMs <= 0 && !isDone ? "Nettoyage dû depuis" : "Prochain nettoyage"}: {nextDueDate.toLocaleString('fr-FR')}</span>
+        <span className={timeRemainingMs <= 0 && !isDone ? "text-red-300 font-bold" : ""}>
+          {timeRemainingMs <= 0 
+            ? `En retard de ${formatTimeRemaining(Math.abs(timeRemainingMs))}`
+            : `Il reste ${formatTimeRemaining(timeRemainingMs)}`
+          }
+        </span>
+      </div>
+
+      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+        {isAdmin && !editingName && !editingFrequency && (
+          <span className="text-sm text-gray-300 cursor-pointer hover:text-white transition-colors" onClick={() => setEditingName(true)} title="Modifier le nom de la tâche">
+            Modifier Nom
+          </span>
+        )}
+        {isAdmin && editingName && (
+          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
+            <button onClick={handleNameSave} className="bg-blue-600 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded hover:bg-blue-500">
+              OK
+            </button>
+            <button onClick={() => setEditingName(false)} className="bg-gray-500 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded hover:bg-gray-400">
+              X
+            </button>
+          </div>
+        )}
+
+        {isAdmin && !editingFrequency && !editingName && (
+          <span className="text-sm text-gray-300 cursor-pointer hover:text-white transition-colors" onClick={() => setEditingFrequency(true)} title="Modifier la fréquence">
+            Modifier Fréq.
+          </span>
+        )}
+        {isAdmin && editingFrequency && (
+          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
+            <input
+              type="number"
+              value={editingFrequencyValue}
+              onChange={(e) => setEditingFrequencyValue(parseInt(e.target.value) || 1)}
+              className="w-16 bg-black border border-gray-800 rounded p-1 text-white text-xs outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+              min="1"
+            />
+            <select
+              value={editingFrequencyUnit}
+              onChange={(e) => setEditingFrequencyUnit(e.target.value)}
+              className="bg-black border border-gray-800 rounded p-1 text-white text-xs outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+            >
+              {Object.keys(FREQUENCY_MS).map(unit => (
+                <option key={unit} value={unit}>
+                  {unit.toLowerCase()}
+                </option>
+              ))}
+            </select>
+            <button onClick={handleFrequencySave} className="bg-blue-600 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded hover:bg-blue-500">
+              OK
+            </button>
+            <button onClick={() => setEditingFrequency(false)} className="bg-gray-500 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded hover:bg-gray-400">
+              X
+            </button>
+          </div>
+        )}
+
+
+        {log && displayTimestamp && (
+          <div className="text-xs text-gray-300 text-right min-w-[120px]">
+            {log.action === 'done' ? (
+                <span className="font-semibold">Nettoyage réalisé par {log.userEmail}</span>
+            ) : log.action === 'undone' ? (
+                <span className="font-semibold">Saleté relevée par {log.userEmail}</span>
+            ) : null}
+            <br />
+            {displayTimestamp.toLocaleString('fr-FR')}
+          </div>
+        )}
+        <button
+          onClick={() => onShowHistory(item)}
+          className="p-2 text-gray-300 hover:text-white"
+          title="Voir l'historique"
+        >
+          <History size={18} />
+        </button>
+        {isAdmin && (
+          <button
+            onClick={() => onDeleteTask(item.id, item.name)}
+            className="p-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-500"
+            title="Supprimer la tâche"
+          >
+            <Trash2 size={18} />
+          </button>
+        )}
+        <button
+          onClick={() => onLogEvent(item.id, item.name, isDone)}
+          className={`px-4 py-2 rounded w-28 font-bold ${isDone ? 'bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700' : 'bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700'} shadow-md`}
+        >
+          {isDone ? 'C\'est sale' : 'J\'ai nettoyé!'}
+        </button>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+
+// --- Main CleaningChecklist Component ---
+export default function CleaningChecklist({ userData, showAdminView }) {
+  const { user } = useAuth();
+  const { addLog } = useLogs(); // Added useLogs
+  const isAdmin = userData?.role === 'admin' && showAdminView;
+  const [taskConfig, setTaskConfig] = useState({});
+  const [lastEvents, setLastEvents] = useState({});
+  const [modalTask, setModalTask] = useState(null);
+  const [now, setNow] = useState(Date.now());
+  const [loggedOverdueTasksThisSession, setLoggedOverdueTasksThisSession] = useState({});
+
+  const [showAddItemForm, setShowAddItemForm] = useState(false);
+  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');
+  const [newItemFrequencyValue, setNewItemFrequencyValue] = useState(1);
+  const [newItemFrequencyUnit, setNewItemFrequencyUnit] = useState('HEURE');
+  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState('');
+  const [newCategoryNameInput, setNewCategoryNameInput] = useState('');
+  const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);
+
+  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('category');
+  const [showOnlyCritical, setShowOnlyCritical] = useState(false);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const timer = setInterval(() => setNow(Date.now()), 1000);
+    return () => clearInterval(timer);
+  }, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const seedTasks = async () => {
+      const tasksCollectionRef = collection(db, 'cleaning_tasks');
+      const snapshot = await getDocs(tasksCollectionRef);
+      if (snapshot.empty) {
+        const batch = writeBatch(db);
+        Object.values(initialTasksForSeeding).forEach(category => {
+          const allTasks = [...(category.points || []), ...(category.refills || [])];
+          allTasks.forEach(task => {
+            const docRef = firestoreDoc(tasksCollectionRef, task.id);
+            batch.set(docRef, { ...task, category: category.title });
+          });
+        });
+        await batch.commit();
+        console.log("Cleaning tasks seeded successfully!");
+      }
+    };
+    seedTasks();
+  }, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const tasksCollectionRef = collection(db, 'cleaning_tasks');
+    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(tasksCollectionRef, (snapshot) => {
+      const groupedTasks = {};
+      snapshot.forEach(doc => {
+        const taskData = doc.data();
+        const task = { id: doc.id, ...taskData };
+        if (!groupedTasks[task.category]) {
+          groupedTasks[task.category] = [];
+        }
+        groupedTasks[task.category].push(task);
+      });
+      Object.keys(groupedTasks).forEach(category => {
+        groupedTasks[category].sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
+      });
+      setTaskConfig(groupedTasks);
+    });
+    return () => unsubscribe();
+  }, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const historyCollectionRef = collection(db, 'cleaning_history');
+    const q = query(historyCollectionRef, orderBy('timestamp', 'asc'));
+    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (querySnapshot) => {
+      const eventMap = new Map();
+      querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {
+        eventMap.set(doc.data().taskId, doc.data());
+      });
+      setLastEvents(Object.fromEntries(eventMap.entries()));
+    });
+    return () => unsubscribe();
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleLogEvent = async (itemId, itemName, isCurrentlyDone) => {
+    if (!user) return console.error("User not authenticated");
+    const actionType = isCurrentlyDone ? 'undone' : 'done';
+    const logMessage = actionType === 'done' 
+      ? `NETTOYAGE : "${itemName}" a été réalisé.` 
+      : `NETTOYAGE : Saleté relevée pour "${itemName}".`;
+    
+    await addDoc(collection(db, 'cleaning_history'), {
+      taskId: itemId,
+      action: actionType,
+      userId: user.uid,
+      userEmail: user.email || 'Utilisateur inconnu',
+      timestamp: Timestamp.now(),
+    });
+
+    await addLog(logMessage, 'info', user, 'cleaning');
+  };
+
+  const handleFrequencyChange = async (taskId, newFrequencyMs, displayValue, displayUnit) => {
+    try {
+      const taskDocRef = firestoreDoc(db, 'cleaning_tasks', taskId);
+      await updateDoc(taskDocRef, {
+        frequency: newFrequencyMs,
+        frequencyDisplayValue: displayValue,
+        frequencyDisplayUnit: displayUnit,
+      });
+      alert(`Fréquence mise à jour.`);
+      await addLog(`NETTOYAGE : Fréquence de "${taskId}" mise à jour à ${displayValue}/${displayUnit.toLowerCase()}.`, 'info', user, 'cleaning');
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Erreur:", error);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleNameChange = async (taskId, newName) => {
+    try {
+      const taskDocRef = firestoreDoc(db, 'cleaning_tasks', taskId);
+      await updateDoc(taskDocRef, {
+        name: newName,
+      });
+      alert(`Nom mis à jour.`);
+      await addLog(`NETTOYAGE : Tâche "${taskId}" renommée en "${newName}".`, 'info', user, 'cleaning');
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Erreur:", error);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleDeleteTask = async (taskId, taskName) => {
+    if (!window.confirm(`Supprimer "${taskName}" ?`)) return;
+    try {
+      await deleteDoc(firestoreDoc(db, 'cleaning_tasks', taskId));
+      await addLog(`NETTOYAGE : Tâche "${taskName}" supprimée.`, 'info', user, 'cleaning');
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Erreur:", error);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleDeleteCategory = async (categoryTitle) => {
+    if (!window.confirm(`Supprimer la catégorie "${categoryTitle}" ?`)) return;
+    try {
+      const tasksCollectionRef = collection(db, 'cleaning_tasks');
+      const q = query(tasksCollectionRef, where('category', '==', categoryTitle));
+      const querySnapshot = await getDocs(q);
+      const batch = writeBatch(db);
+      querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {
+        batch.delete(doc.ref);
+      });
+      await batch.commit();
+      await addLog(`NETTOYAGE : Catégorie "${categoryTitle}" et toutes ses tâches supprimées.`, 'info', user, 'cleaning');
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Erreur:", error);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleAddItem = async () => {
+    const finalCategoryName = newItemCategory === "Nouvelle Catégorie" ? newCategoryNameInput : newItemCategory;
+    if (!newItemName || !finalCategoryName || newItemFrequencyValue <= 0) {
+      alert("Veuillez tout remplir.");
+      return;
+    }
+    const newFrequencyMs = FREQUENCY_MS[newItemFrequencyUnit] / newItemFrequencyValue;
+    setIsAddingItem(true);
+    try {
+      const tasksCollectionRef = collection(db, 'cleaning_tasks');
+      const newDocRef = firestoreDoc(tasksCollectionRef);
+      await setDoc(newDocRef, {
+        name: newItemName,
+        category: finalCategoryName,
+        frequency: newFrequencyMs,
+        frequencyDisplayValue: newItemFrequencyValue,
+        frequencyDisplayUnit: newItemFrequencyUnit,
+      });
+      await addLog(`NETTOYAGE : Nouvelle tâche "${newItemName}" ajoutée à "${finalCategoryName}".`, 'info', user, 'cleaning');
+      setNewItemName('');
+      setShowAddItemForm(false);
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Erreur:", error);
+    } finally {
+      setIsAddingItem(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleShowHistory = (task) => setModalTask(task);
+  const handleCloseModal = () => setModalTask(null);
+  
+  const allCategories = Object.keys(taskConfig);
+
+  const getProcessedTasks = () => {
+    const allTasksFlat = [];
+    Object.entries(taskConfig).forEach(([categoryTitle, tasks]) => {
+      tasks.forEach(item => {
+        const lastEvent = lastEvents[item.id];
+        let isDone = false;
+        let nextDueDateMs;
+
+        // Ensure frequency is a valid positive number. Default to 1 day if 0 or invalid.
+        const effectiveFrequency = (item.frequency && item.frequency > 0) ? item.frequency : FREQUENCY_MS.JOUR;
+
+        if (lastEvent) {
+          const lastEventTimestamp = lastEvent.timestamp.toDate().getTime();
+          if (lastEvent.action === 'done') {
+            // Base the next due date on the last completion time.
+            nextDueDateMs = lastEventTimestamp + effectiveFrequency;
+          } else { // 'undone' or 'overdue'
+            // Task was explicitly marked as not clean, so it's due since that time.
+            nextDueDateMs = lastEventTimestamp;
+          }
+        } else {
+          // This is a new task with no history. Schedule its first cleaning from 'now'.
+          // The due date will move, but it avoids being stuck and prompts a first cleaning.
+          nextDueDateMs = now + effectiveFrequency;
+        }
+
+        // A task is only considered "done" if its last action was 'done'
+        // and we are still within the frequency period.
+        isDone = lastEvent?.action === 'done' && now < nextDueDateMs;
+        
+        // Final check to prevent NaN
+        if (isNaN(nextDueDateMs)) {
+            console.warn(`Invalid nextDueDateMs calculated for task ${item.name}. Defaulting to now.`);
+            nextDueDateMs = now;
+        }
+        
+        const nextDueDate = new Date(nextDueDateMs);
+        const timeRemainingMs = nextDueDateMs - now;
+
+        allTasksFlat.push({
+          ...item,
+          categoryTitle,
+          isDone,
+          lastEvent,
+          nextDueDate,
+          timeRemainingMs
+        });
+      });
+    });
+
+    let filtered = allTasksFlat;
+    if (showOnlyCritical) {
+      filtered = allTasksFlat.filter(t => t.timeRemainingMs <= 0 && !t.isDone);
+    }
+
+    const sorted = [...filtered].sort((a, b) => {
+      if (sortBy === 'name') {
+        return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+      } else if (sortBy === 'delay') {
+        return a.timeRemainingMs - b.timeRemainingMs;
+      } else {
+        const catCompare = a.categoryTitle.localeCompare(b.categoryTitle);
+        if (catCompare !== 0) return catCompare;
+        return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+      }
+    });
+
+    return sorted;
+  };
+
+  const processedTasks = getProcessedTasks();
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    // This effect runs every time processedTasks or now changes (i.e., every second)
+    processedTasks.forEach(async (task) => {
+      const isOverdue = task.timeRemainingMs <= 0 && !task.isDone;
+      const wasLoggedOverdueThisSession = loggedOverdueTasksThisSession[task.id];
+
+      if (isOverdue && !wasLoggedOverdueThisSession) {
+        // Check if the last event in cleaning_history for this task is already 'overdue' for this cycle.
+        // This prevents re-logging if the app reloads or the component re-renders.
+        const lastEventForTask = lastEvents[task.id];
+        const alreadyLoggedOverdueInDb = lastEventForTask &&
+                                       lastEventForTask.action === 'overdue' &&
+                                       lastEventForTask.timestamp.toDate().getTime() >= task.nextDueDate.getTime();
+
+        if (!alreadyLoggedOverdueInDb) {
+          console.log(`[System] Logging overdue event for task: ${task.name}`);
+          const logMessage = `NETTOYAGE : La tâche "${task.name}" est en retard!`;
+
+          await addDoc(collection(db, 'cleaning_history'), {
+            taskId: task.id,
+            action: 'overdue',
+            userId: 'system', // Indicate it's a system-generated event
+            userEmail: 'system@mictlan.com', // Placeholder or dedicated system email
+            timestamp: Timestamp.now(),
+            message: `Tâche "${task.name}" est en retard.`, // Adding a specific message field for overdue events
+          });
+
+          // Log to general application logs as well
+          await addLog(logMessage, 'warning', user, 'cleaning');
+          
+          // Mark this task as having its overdue status logged for the current session
+          setLoggedOverdueTasksThisSession(prev => ({ ...prev, [task.id]: true }));
+        }
+      } else if (!isOverdue && wasLoggedOverdueThisSession) {
+        // If a task was overdue and logged, but is now no longer overdue
+        // (e.g., it was cleaned, or its nextDueDate was updated),
+        // reset its session logging status so it can be logged again if it becomes overdue later.
+        setLoggedOverdueTasksThisSession(prev => {
+          const newLogged = { ...prev };
+          delete newLogged[task.id];
+          return newLogged;
+        });
+      }
+    });
+  }, [processedTasks, now, loggedOverdueTasksThisSession, addLog, lastEvents, user]);
+
+  return (
+    <div className="p-4 sm:p-6 text-white max-w-4xl mx-auto">
+      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-yellow-500 mb-6 text-center">Checklist de Nettoyage</h1>
+      
+      <div className="mb-6 p-4 bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl border border-gray-700 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4">
+        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 flex-wrap">
+          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+            <Filter size={18} className="text-mictlan-gold" />
+            <span className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Trier par :</span>
+            <select
+              value={sortBy}
+              onChange={(e) => setSortBy(e.target.value)}
+              className="bg-black border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+            >
+              <option value="category">Catégorie</option>
+              <option value="name">Nom</option>
+              <option value="delay">Retard</option>
+            </select>
+          </div>
+
+          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer group">
+            <input
+              type="checkbox"
+              checked={showOnlyCritical}
+              onChange={(e) => setShowOnlyCritical(e.target.checked)}
+              className="w-5 h-5 bg-black border border-gray-700 rounded text-mictlan-gold focus:ring-mictlan-gold cursor-pointer"
+            />
+            <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-400 group-hover:text-white transition-colors">
+              Retards critiques uniquement
+            </span>
+          </label>
+        </div>
+
+        {isAdmin && (
+          <button 
+            onClick={() => setShowAddItemForm(!showAddItemForm)}
+            className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600/80 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-500 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold"
+          >
+            <PlusCircle size={18} />
+            {showAddItemForm ? 'Annuler' : 'Ajouter tâche'}
+          </button>
+        )}
+      </div>
+
+      {showAddItemForm && isAdmin && (
+        <div className="mb-6 p-4 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg space-y-3 border border-blue-900/30">
+          <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-yellow-500">Nouvelle Tâche</h3>
+          <div>
+            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Nom de la tâche</label>
+            <input
+              type="text"
+              value={newItemName}
+              onChange={(e) => setNewItemName(e.target.value)}
+              className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+              placeholder="Ex: Nettoyage tables"
+            />
+          </div>
+          <div>
+            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Fréquence</label>
+            <div className="flex gap-2">
+              <input
+                type="number"
+                value={newItemFrequencyValue}
+                onChange={(e) => setNewItemFrequencyValue(parseInt(e.target.value) || 1)}
+                className="w-24 bg-black border border-gray-700 rounded p-2 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+                min="1"
+              />
+              <select
+                value={newItemFrequencyUnit}
+                onChange={(e) => setNewItemFrequencyUnit(e.target.value)}
+                className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-700 rounded p-2 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+              >
+                {Object.keys(FREQUENCY_MS).map(unit => (
+                  <option key={unit} value={unit}>
+                    {unit.toLowerCase()}
+                  </option>
+                ))}
+              </select>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+          <div>
+            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Catégorie</label>
+            <select
+              value={newItemCategory}
+              onChange={(e) => {
+                setNewItemCategory(e.target.value);
+                if (e.target.value === "Nouvelle Catégorie") {
+                  setNewCategoryNameInput('');
+                }
+              }}
+              className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-700 rounded p-2 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+            >
+              <option value="">-- Sélectionner ou créer une catégorie --</option>
+              {allCategories.map(cat => (
+                <option key={cat} value={cat}>{cat}</option>
+              ))}
+              <option value="Nouvelle Catégorie">-- Nouvelle Catégorie --</option>
+            </select>
+            {newItemCategory === "Nouvelle Catégorie" && (
+              <input
+                type="text"
+                value={newCategoryNameInput}
+                onChange={(e) => setNewCategoryNameInput(e.target.value)}
+                className="w-full mt-2 bg-black border border-gray-700 rounded p-2 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+                placeholder="Nom de la nouvelle catégorie"
+              />
+            )}
+          </div>
+          <button
+            onClick={handleAddItem}
+            disabled={isAddingItem}
+            className="px-4 py-2 bg-green-600/80 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-green-500 transition-colors font-bold"
+          >
+            {isAddingItem ? 'Ajout en cours...' : 'Sauvegarder la tâche'}
+          </button>
+        </div>
+      )}
+      
+      {sortBy === 'category' ? (
+        allCategories.map(categoryTitle => {
+          const tasksInCategory = processedTasks.filter(t => t.categoryTitle === categoryTitle);
+          if (tasksInCategory.length === 0) return null;
+
+          return (
+            <div key={categoryTitle} className="mb-8">
+              <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold border-b-2 border-gray-600 pb-2 mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
+                {categoryTitle}
+                {isAdmin && (
+                  <button
+                    onClick={() => handleDeleteCategory(categoryTitle)}
+                    className="ml-4 p-2 text-red-400 hover:text-red-600"
+                    title="Supprimer la catégorie et toutes ses tâches"
+                  >
+                    <Trash2 size={20} />
+                  </button>
+                )}
+              </h2>
+              <div className="space-y-3">
+                {tasksInCategory.map(item => (
+                  <ChecklistItem 
+                    key={item.id} 
+                    item={item} 
+                    onLogEvent={handleLogEvent}
+                    onShowHistory={handleShowHistory}
+                    isDone={item.isDone}
+                    log={item.lastEvent} 
+                    isAdmin={isAdmin}
+                    onFrequencyChange={handleFrequencyChange}
+                    onDeleteTask={handleDeleteTask}
+                    nextDueDate={item.nextDueDate}
+                    timeRemainingMs={item.timeRemainingMs}
+                    onNameChange={handleNameChange}
+                  />
+                ))}
+              </div>
+            </div>
+          );
+        })
+      ) : (
+        <div className="space-y-3">
+          {processedTasks.length > 0 ? (
+            processedTasks.map(item => (
+              <div key={item.id}>
+                {sortBy !== 'category' && (
+                  <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest font-black ml-1 mb-1">
+                    {item.categoryTitle}
+                  </div>
+                )}
+                <ChecklistItem 
+                  item={item} 
+                  onLogEvent={handleLogEvent}
+                  onShowHistory={handleShowHistory}
+                  isDone={item.isDone}
+                  log={item.lastEvent} 
+                  isAdmin={isAdmin}
+                  onFrequencyChange={handleFrequencyChange}
+                  onDeleteTask={handleDeleteTask}
+                  nextDueDate={item.nextDueDate}
+                  timeRemainingMs={item.timeRemainingMs}
+                  onNameChange={handleNameChange}
+                />
+              </div>
+            ))
+          ) : (
+            <div className="text-center py-10 text-gray-500 italic">
+              Aucune tâche ne correspond aux critères.
+            </div>
+          )}
+        </div>
+      )}
+
+      {modalTask && (
+        <HistoryModal
+          taskId={modalTask.id}
+          taskName={modalTask.name}
+          onClose={handleCloseModal}
+        />
+      )}
+
+      <div className="mt-8 max-w-4xl mx-auto">
+        <ActivityLog defaultCategory="cleaning" />
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+

-    const priceMatch = priceFilter ? product.price <= parseFloat(priceFilter) : true;
-    return categoryMatch && priceMatch;
-  });
-

-          onChange={(e) => setCategoryFilter(e.target.value)}
-          className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
-        >
-          <option value="">Toutes les catégories</option>
-          {categories.map(category => (
-            <option key={category} value={category}>{category}</option>
-          ))}
-        </select>

-          type="number"
-          placeholder="Filtrer par prix max"
-          value={priceFilter}
-          onChange={(e) => setPriceFilter(e.target.value)}
-          className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
-        />

-          <input
-            type="number"

-            </div>
-          )}
-        </div>
-      )}
-    </Card>

+import React, { useState } from 'react';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { Lightbulb, HelpCircle } from 'lucide-react';
+import { useProducts } from '../hooks/useProducts';
+import { useDishes } from '../hooks/useDishes';
+import { useSettings } from '../hooks/useSettings';
+
+export default function ClientSuggestions() {
+  const { products, loading: productsLoading } = useProducts();
+  const { dishes, loading: dishesLoading } = useDishes();
+  const { settings } = useSettings();
+  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState('');
+  const [priceFilter, setPriceFilter] = useState('');
+  const [daysUntilExpiry, setDaysUntilExpiry] = useState(7);
+  const [showExplanation, setShowExplanation] = useState(false);
+
+  const categories = [...new Set(products.map(p => p.category).filter(Boolean))];
+
+  const isDayOpen = (date) => {
+    const dateString = date.toISOString().split('T')[0];
+    if (settings.openingDays && settings.openingDays[dateString] !== undefined) {
+      return settings.openingDays[dateString];
+    }
+    const day = date.getDay();
+    return day !== 0 && day !== 1; // Not Sunday or Monday
+  };
+
+  const getFutureOpenDate = (startDate, days) => {
+    let count = 0;
+    let futureDate = new Date(startDate);
+    while (count < days) {
+      futureDate.setDate(futureDate.getDate() + 1);
+      if (isDayOpen(futureDate)) {
+        count++;
+      }
+    }
+    return futureDate;
+  };
+
+  const expiringSoon = products.filter(product => {
+    if (!product.expiryDate || product.decisionStatus !== 'to_handle') return false;
+    const expiry = product.expiryDate.toDate();
+    const today = new Date();
+    const expiryWindow = getFutureOpenDate(today, daysUntilExpiry);
+    return expiry > today && expiry <= expiryWindow;
+  });
+
+  const filteredProducts = expiringSoon.filter(product => {
+    const categoryMatch = categoryFilter ? product.category === categoryFilter : true;
+    const priceMatch = priceFilter ? product.price <= parseFloat(priceFilter) : true;
+    return categoryMatch && priceMatch;
+  });
+
+  const expiringSoonProductIds = expiringSoon.map(p => p.id);
+  const suggestedDishes = dishes.filter(dish => 
+    dish.ingredients?.some(ingredientId => expiringSoonProductIds.includes(ingredientId))
+  );
+
+  const loading = productsLoading || dishesLoading;
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Suggestions Clients" titleIcon={<Lightbulb />}>
+      <div className="flex space-x-4 mb-4">
+        <select
+          value={categoryFilter}
+          onChange={(e) => setCategoryFilter(e.target.value)}
+          className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+        >
+          <option value="">Toutes les catégories</option>
+          {categories.map(category => (
+            <option key={category} value={category}>{category}</option>
+          ))}
+        </select>
+        <input
+          type="number"
+          placeholder="Filtrer par prix max"
+          value={priceFilter}
+          onChange={(e) => setPriceFilter(e.target.value)}
+          className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+        />
+        <div className="relative w-full">
+          <input
+            type="number"
+            placeholder="Jours avant expiration"
+            value={daysUntilExpiry}
+            onChange={(e) => setDaysUntilExpiry(parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 0)}
+            className="w-full p-2 pr-8 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+          />
+          <HelpCircle
+            className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 cursor-pointer"
+            size={16}
+            onClick={() => setShowExplanation(!showExplanation)}
+          />
+        </div>
+      </div>
+      {showExplanation && (
+        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">
+          Nombre de jours ouverts avant l'expiration pendant lesquels les produits sont affichés dans les suggestions.
+        </p>
+      )}
+      {loading ? (
+        <div className="text-center text-gray-500">Chargement...</div>
+      ) : (
+        <div className="space-y-4">
+          <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-mictlan-gold">Plats Suggérés</h3>
+          {suggestedDishes.length > 0 ? (
+            suggestedDishes.map(dish => (
+              <div key={dish.id} className="p-4 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg">
+                <h3 className="font-bold">{dish.name}</h3>
+              </div>
+            ))
+          ) : (
+            <div className="text-center text-gray-500">
+              <p>Aucun plat suggéré pour le moment.</p>
+            </div>
+          )}
+          <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-mictlan-gold mt-8">Produits Expirant Bientôt</h3>
+          {filteredProducts.length > 0 ? (
+            filteredProducts.map(product => (
+              <div key={product.id} className="p-4 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg">
+                <h3 className="font-bold">{product.name}</h3>
+                <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
+                  Expire le: {product.expiryDate.toDate().toLocaleDateString()}
+                </p>
+                <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
+                  Catégorie: {product.category}
+                </p>
+                <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
+                  Prix: {product.price}€
+                </p>
+                <div className="flex space-x-2 mt-2">
+                  
+                </div>
+              </div>
+            ))
+          ) : (
+            <div className="text-center text-gray-500">
+              <p>Aucun produit ne correspond aux filtres.</p>
+            </div>
+          )}
+        </div>
+      )}
+    </Card>
+  );
+}

+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import app, { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { doc, getDoc, updateDoc, Timestamp, collection, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { Utensils } from 'lucide-react';
+
+export default function DishEditForm({ dishId, onClose }) {
+  const [dishName, setDishName] = useState('');
+  const [description, setDescription] = useState('');
+  const [selectedIngredients, setSelectedIngredients] = useState([]);
+  const [availableProducts, setAvailableProducts] = useState([]);
+
+  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
+  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState('');
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const fetchDish = async () => {
+      if (!dishId) return;
+      const docRef = doc(db, 'dishes', dishId);
+      const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef);
+      if (docSnap.exists()) {
+        const data = docSnap.data();
+        setDishName(data.name);
+        setDescription(data.description || '');
+        setSelectedIngredients(data.ingredients || []);
+      } else {
+        console.error("No such document!");
+        onClose(); // Close if dish not found
+      }
+    };
+
+    const fetchProducts = async () => {
+        const productsCol = collection(db, 'products');
+        const productSnapshot = await getDocs(productsCol);
+        const productList = productSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, name: doc.data().name }));
+        setAvailableProducts(productList);
+    };
+
+    fetchDish();
+    fetchProducts();
+  }, [dishId, onClose]);
+
+  const handleIngredientChange = (e) => {
+    const options = Array.from(e.target.selectedOptions, option => option.value);
+    setSelectedIngredients(options);
+  };
+
+  const handleUpdateDish = async (e) => {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    setIsSaving(true);
+    setFeedback('Mise à jour...');
+
+    if (!dishName || selectedIngredients.length === 0) {
+      setFeedback('Veuillez remplir le nom du plat et sélectionner au moins un ingrédient.');
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    try {
+      const dishRef = doc(db, 'dishes', dishId);
+      await updateDoc(dishRef, {
+        name: dishName,
+        description: description,
+        ingredients: selectedIngredients,
+      });
+      setFeedback('Plat mis à jour avec succès !');
+      onClose(); // Close form after successful update
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error updating dish:", error);
+      setFeedback('Erreur lors de la mise à jour du plat.');
+    } finally {
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      setTimeout(() => setFeedback(''), 3000);
+    }
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Modifier un Plat" titleIcon={<Utensils />}>
+      <form onSubmit={handleUpdateDish} className="space-y-4 text-xs">
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="dishName" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Nom du Plat <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <input
+            type="text"
+            id="dishName"
+            value={dishName}
+            onChange={(e) => setDishName(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: Tacos al Pastor"
+            required
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="description" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Description (optionnel)</label>
+          <textarea
+            id="description"
+            value={description}
+            onChange={(e) => setDescription(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Description du plat..."
+            rows="3"
+          ></textarea>
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="ingredients" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Ingrédients <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <select
+            multiple
+            id="ingredients"
+            value={selectedIngredients}
+            onChange={handleIngredientChange}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold h-32"
+            required
+          >
+            {availableProducts.map(product => (
+              <option key={product.id} value={product.id}>
+                {product.name}
+              </option>
+            ))}
+          </select>
+          <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-1">Maintenez Ctrl (ou Cmd sur Mac) pour sélectionner plusieurs ingrédients.</p>
+        </div>
+
+        <div className="flex space-x-4">
+          <button
+            type="button"
+            onClick={onClose}
+            className="w-full bg-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-700 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
+          >
+            Annuler
+          </button>
+          <button
+            type="submit"
+            disabled={isSaving}
+            className="w-full bg-mictlan-gold hover:bg-mictlan-gold/80 text-black font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
+          >
+            {isSaving ? 'Mise à jour en cours...' : 'Mettre à jour Plat'}
+          </button>
+        </div>
+        {feedback && <p className="mt-2 text-center text-sm text-mictlan-gold">{feedback}</p>}
+      </form>
+    </Card>
+  );
+}

-            value={description}

-            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
-            placeholder="Description du plat..."
-            rows="3"

-          <label htmlFor="ingredients" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Ingrédients <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
-          <select
-            multiple

-          type="submit"
-          disabled={isSaving}
-          className="w-full bg-mictlan-gold hover:bg-mictlan-gold/80 text-black font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"

+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import app, { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { collection, addDoc, Timestamp, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { Utensils } from 'lucide-react';
+import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth';
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs';
+
+export default function DishForm() {
+  const { user } = useAuth();
+  const { addLog } = useLogs();
+  const [dishName, setDishName] = useState('');
+  const [description, setDescription] = useState('');
+  const [selectedIngredients, setSelectedIngredients] = useState([]);
+  const [availableProducts, setAvailableProducts] = useState([]);
+
+  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
+  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState('');
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const fetchProducts = async () => {
+      const productsCol = collection(db, 'products');
+      const productSnapshot = await getDocs(productsCol);
+      const productList = productSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, name: doc.data().name }));
+      setAvailableProducts(productList);
+    };
+    fetchProducts();
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleIngredientChange = (e) => {
+    const options = Array.from(e.target.selectedOptions, option => option.value);
+    setSelectedIngredients(options);
+  };
+
+  const handleSaveDish = async (e) => {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    setIsSaving(true);
+    setFeedback('Sauvegarde...');
+
+    if (!dishName || selectedIngredients.length === 0) {
+      setFeedback('Veuillez remplir le nom du plat et sélectionner au moins un ingrédient.');
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    try {
+      await addDoc(collection(db, 'dishes'), {
+        name: dishName,
+        description: description,
+        ingredients: selectedIngredients,
+        creationDate: Timestamp.now(),
+      });
+      await addLog(`INVENTAIRE : Plat "${dishName}" ajouté.`, 'info', user, 'inventory');
+      setFeedback('Plat ajouté avec succès !');
+      // Clear form
+      setDishName('');
+      setDescription('');
+      setSelectedIngredients([]);
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error adding dish:", error);
+      setFeedback('Erreur lors de l\'ajout du plat.');
+    } finally {
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      setTimeout(() => setFeedback(''), 3000);
+    }
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Ajouter un Plat" titleIcon={<Utensils />}>
+      <form onSubmit={handleSaveDish} className="space-y-4 text-xs">
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="dishName" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Nom du Plat <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <input
+            type="text"
+            id="dishName"
+            value={dishName}
+            onChange={(e) => setDishName(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: Tacos al Pastor"
+            required
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="description" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Description (optionnel)</label>
+          <textarea
+            id="description"
+            value={description}
+            onChange={(e) => setDescription(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Description du plat..."
+            rows="3"
+          ></textarea>
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="ingredients" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Ingrédients <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <select
+            multiple
+            id="ingredients"
+            value={selectedIngredients}
+            onChange={handleIngredientChange}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold h-32"
+            required
+          >
+            {availableProducts.map(product => (
+              <option key={product.id} value={product.id}>
+                {product.name}
+              </option>
+            ))}
+          </select>
+          <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-1">Maintenez Ctrl (ou Cmd sur Mac) pour sélectionner plusieurs ingrédients.</p>
+        </div>
+
+        <button
+          type="submit"
+          disabled={isSaving}
+          className="w-full bg-mictlan-gold hover:bg-mictlan-gold/80 text-black font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
+        >
+          {isSaving ? 'Ajout en cours...' : 'Ajouter le Plat'}
+        </button>
+        {feedback && <p className="mt-2 text-center text-sm text-mictlan-gold">{feedback}</p>}
+      </form>
+    </Card>
+  );
+}

+import { useState } from 'react';
+import { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { doc, deleteDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { Utensils, Edit, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
+import { useDishes } from '../hooks/useDishes';
+import { useProducts } from '../hooks/useProducts';
+import DishEditForm from './DishEditForm';
+import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth';
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs';
+
+export default function DishList() {
+  const { dishes, loading, error } = useDishes();
+  const { products } = useProducts();
+  const { user } = useAuth();
+  const { addLog } = useLogs();
+  const [editingDishId, setEditingDishId] = useState(null);
+
+  const handleDeleteDish = async (dishId) => {
+    const dish = dishes.find(d => d.id === dishId);
+    if (window.confirm("Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ce plat ?")) {
+      try {
+        await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'dishes', dishId));
+        await addLog(`INVENTAIRE : Plat "${dish?.name || dishId}" supprimé.`, 'info', user, 'inventory');
+        alert("Plat supprimé avec succès !");
+      } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error deleting dish:", error);
+        alert("Erreur lors de la suppression du plat.");
+      }
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleEditClick = (dishId) => {
+    setEditingDishId(dishId);
+  };
+
+  const handleCloseEditForm = () => {
+    setEditingDishId(null);
+  };
+
+  // Create a map for product IDs to names for easy lookup
+  const productIdToNameMap = products.reduce((acc, product) => {
+    acc[product.id] = product.name;
+    return acc;
+  }, {});
+
+  if (loading) {
+    return (
+      <Card title="Liste des Plats" titleIcon={<Utensils />}>
+        <p className="text-center text-gray-400">Chargement des plats...</p>
+      </Card>
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (error) {
+    return (
+      <Card title="Liste des Plats" titleIcon={<Utensils />}>
+        <p className="text-center text-red-500">{error.message}</p>
+      </Card>
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <Card title="Liste des Plats" titleIcon={<Utensils />}>
+        {dishes.length === 0 ? (
+          <p className="text-center text-gray-400">Aucun plat enregistré.</p>
+        ) : (
+          <ul className="space-y-4">
+            {dishes.map(dish => (
+              <li key={dish.id} className="bg-black/30 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-700">
+                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
+                  <h3 className="text-mictlan-gold font-bold text-sm uppercase">{dish.name}</h3>
+                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
+                    <button 
+                      onClick={() => handleEditClick(dish.id)}
+                      className="text-gray-400 hover:text-mictlan-gold transition-colors"
+                    >
+                      <Edit size={16} />
+                    </button>
+                    <button 
+                      onClick={() => handleDeleteDish(dish.id)}
+                      className="text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors"
+                    >
+                      <Trash2 size={16} />
+                    </button>
+                  </div>
+                </div>
+                {dish.description && (
+                  <p className="text-gray-300 text-xs mt-2">{dish.description}</p>
+                )}
+                {dish.ingredients && dish.ingredients.length > 0 && (
+                  <div className="mt-2">
+                    <p className="text-gray-400 text-xs font-bold">Ingrédients:</p>
+                    <ul className="list-disc list-inside text-gray-300 text-xs">
+                      {dish.ingredients.map(ingredientId => (
+                        <li key={ingredientId}>{productIdToNameMap[ingredientId] || 'Produit Inconnu'}</li>
+                      ))}
+                    </ul>
+                  </div>
+                )}
+              </li>
+            ))}
+          </ul>
+        )}
+      </Card>
+
+      {editingDishId && (
+        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-75 flex items-center justify-center z-50">
+          <div className="relative bg-gray-900 p-6 rounded-lg max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto w-full max-w-md">
+            <button 
+              onClick={handleCloseEditForm}
+              className="absolute top-3 right-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white"
+            >
+              &times;
+            </button>
+            <DishEditForm dishId={editingDishId} onClose={handleCloseEditForm} />
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      )}
+    </>
+  );
+}
+

+import { CheckCircle2, ListChecks } from 'lucide-react';
+import Card from './Card'; // Assuming Card is the component name
+import { useSettings } from '../hooks/useSettings'; // Import useSettings
+
+export default function FeaturesCard() {
+  const { settings, updateSettings } = useSettings();
+
+  // Define features as objects with an id and a display name
+  const featuresList = [
+    { id: 'toggleWaiterBillTPE', name: 'Toggles Waiter/Bill/TPE' },
+    { id: 'modeDoubleGrid', name: 'Mode Double Grid' },
+  ];
+
+  const handleToggleFeature = (featureId) => {
+    updateSettings({
+      features: {
+        ...settings.features,
+        [featureId]: !settings.features?.[featureId],
+      },
+    });
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Features" titleIcon={<ListChecks />}>
+      <div className="space-y-3">
+        {featuresList.map((feature, i) => (
+          <div key={feature.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-black/20 rounded-xl border border-gray-800/50">
+            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
+              <CheckCircle2 size={14} className="text-mictlan-gold" />
+              <span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase">{feature.name}</span>
+            </div>
+            {/* Toggle Switch */}
+            <label htmlFor={`toggle-${feature.id}`} className="flex items-center cursor-pointer">
+              <div className="relative">
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  id={`toggle-${feature.id}`}
+                  className="sr-only"
+                  checked={settings.features?.[feature.id] || false}
+                  onChange={() => handleToggleFeature(feature.id)}
+                />
+                <div className="block bg-gray-600 w-10 h-6 rounded-full"></div>
+                <div className="dot absolute left-1 top-1 bg-white w-4 h-4 rounded-full transition"></div>
+              </div>
+            </label>
+          </div>
+        ))}
+      </div>
+      <style>{`
+        input:checked ~ .dot {
+          transform: translateX(100%);
+          background-color: #FFD700;
+        }
+        input:checked ~ .block {
+          background-color: #374151; /* Darker gray when checked */
+        }
+      `}</style>
+    </Card>
+  );
 }

+  );

+import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { Volume2, VolumeX } from 'lucide-react';
+import { NavLink } from 'react-router-dom'; // Import NavLink
+
+// Fonction pour capitaliser la première lettre
+const capitalize = (s) => s.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + s.slice(1);
+
+export default function Header({ 
+  user, 
+  userData, 
+  onLogout, 
+  isAudioEnabled, 
+  onEnableAudio, 
+  showAdminView, 
+  setShowAdminView,
+  settings,
+  updateSettings
+}) {
+  const prNumber = import.meta.env.VITE_GITHUB_PR_NUMBER;
+  const currentMode = import.meta.env.MODE;
+  const version = import.meta.env.VITE_APP_VERSION;
+
+  const [dateTimeString, setDateTimeString] = useState('');
+  const [weatherData, setWeatherData] = useState(null);
+
+  // Effet pour récupérer les données météo
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const fetchWeather = async () => {
+      const apiKey = import.meta.env.VITE_OPENWEATHER_API_KEY;
+      const city = 'Paris,FR';
+
+      if (!apiKey) {
+        console.error("Clé API OpenWeatherMap non trouvée. Assurez-vous d'avoir un fichier .env.local avec VITE_OPENWEATHER_API_KEY.");
+        setWeatherData({ description: 'Erreur config', temperature: 'N/A' });
+        return;
+      }
+
+      try {
+        const response = await fetch(`https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?q=${city}&appid=${apiKey}&units=metric&lang=fr`);
+        if (!response.ok) {
+          throw new Error('Réponse réseau non OK');
+        }
+        const data = await response.json();
+        setWeatherData({
+          description: data.weather[0].description,
+          temperature: Math.round(data.main.temp),
+        });
+      } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Erreur de récupération météo:", error);
+        setWeatherData({ description: 'Erreur API', temperature: 'N/A' });
+      }
+    };
+
+    fetchWeather(); // Appel initial
+    const interval = setInterval(fetchWeather, 600000); // Rafraîchir toutes les 10 minutes
+
+    return () => clearInterval(interval); // Nettoyage
+  }, []);
+
+  // Effet pour mettre à jour l'affichage de l'heure et de la météo
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const formatDateTime = () => {
+      const now = new Date();
+      const datePart = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('fr-FR', {
+        weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric',
+      }).format(now);
+      const timePart = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('fr-FR', {
+        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit', hour12: false,
+      }).format(now).replace(/:/g, 'h');
+
+      let weatherString = 'Chargement de la météo...';
+      if (weatherData) {
+        weatherString = `${capitalize(weatherData.description)} - ${weatherData.temperature}°C`;
+      }
+      
+      return `${capitalize(datePart)} - ${timePart} - ${weatherString}`;
+    };
+
+    const intervalId = setInterval(() => {
+      setDateTimeString(formatDateTime());
+    }, 1000);
+
+    return () => clearInterval(intervalId);
+  }, [weatherData]);
+
+  let environmentText = '';
+  if (currentMode === 'development') {
+    environmentText = 'local dev realtime modifications';
+  } else if (currentMode === 'staging') {
+    if (prNumber) {
+      environmentText = `staging site PR#${prNumber}`;
+    } else {
+      environmentText = 'local staging build';
+    }
+  } else if (currentMode === 'production' && window.location.hostname === 'localhost') {
+    environmentText = 'local production build';
+  }
+
+  const versionDisplay = `version ${version}${environmentText ? ` - ${environmentText}` : ''}`;
+
+  const linkClass = ({ isActive }) =>
+    `text-white hover:text-yellow-500 ${isActive ? 'font-bold text-yellow-500' : ''}`;
+
+  return (
+    <header className="text-center mb-4 sm:mb-8 relative flex flex-col items-center">
+      <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm mb-1">
+        {versionDisplay}
+      </div>
+      <img src="/mictlan-logo.png" alt="Mictlan Logo" className="w-24 h-auto" style={{ height: '80px', width: 'auto' }} />
+      <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-2">
+        <button onClick={onEnableAudio} className="p-2 text-white">
+          {isAudioEnabled ? <Volume2 /> : <VolumeX className="text-red-500" />}
+        </button>
+      </div>
+
+      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-yellow-500 mb-2">
+        Dashboard Le Mictlan
+      </h1>
+      <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm font-mono mt-2">{dateTimeString}</p> {/* Ajout de la date/heure/météo */}
+      <nav className="flex justify-center gap-4 mt-4">
+        <NavLink to="/" className={linkClass}>Dashboard</NavLink>
+        <NavLink to="/reservations" className={linkClass}>Réservations</NavLink>
+        {userData?.role === 'admin' && showAdminView && (
+          <>
+            <NavLink to="/stocks-cuisine" className={linkClass}>Stocks Cuisine</NavLink>
+            <NavLink to="/cleaning-tasks" className={linkClass}>Nettoyage</NavLink>
+          </>
+        )}
+      </nav>
+
+      <div className="text-white">
+        {user ? (
+          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
+            <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">Connecté: {user.isAnonymous ? 'Anonyme' : user.email}</span>
+            {userData?.role === 'admin' && (
+              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  id="adminView"
+                  checked={showAdminView}
+                  onChange={(e) => setShowAdminView(e.target.checked)}
+                  className="form-checkbox h-4 w-4 text-mictlan-gold bg-gray-800 border-gray-600 rounded focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+                />
+                <label htmlFor="adminView" className="text-xs text-gray-400">Voir les parties d'admin</label>
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  id="anonymousLogin"
+                  checked={settings.anonymousLoginEnabled}
+                  onChange={(e) => updateSettings({ ...settings, anonymousLoginEnabled: e.target.checked })}
+                  className="form-checkbox h-4 w-4 text-mictlan-gold bg-gray-800 border-gray-600 rounded focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+                />
+                <label htmlFor="anonymousLogin" className="text-xs text-gray-400">Connexion anonyme</label>
+              </div>
+            )}
+            <button onClick={onLogout} className="text-xs text-gray-400 underline">Déconnexion</button>
+          </div>
+        ) : (
+          <span className="text-red-400 text-sm">Déconnecté</span>
+        )}
+      </div>
+    </header>
+  );
 }

+import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { collection, query, where, onSnapshot, orderBy } from 'firebase/firestore';
+import { X } from 'lucide-react';
+
+export default function HistoryModal({ taskId, taskName, onClose }) {
+  const [history, setHistory] = useState([]);
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!taskId) {
+      setHistory([]);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setLoading(true);
+    const historyCollectionRef = collection(db, 'cleaning_history');
+    const q = query(
+      historyCollectionRef,
+      where('taskId', '==', taskId),
+      orderBy('timestamp', 'desc')
+    );
+
+    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (querySnapshot) => {
+      const historyData = [];
+      querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {
+        historyData.push({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() });
+      });
+      setHistory(historyData);
+      setLoading(false);
+    });
+
+    return () => unsubscribe();
+  }, [taskId]);
+
+  if (!taskId) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-70 flex items-center justify-center z-50">
+      <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 w-full max-w-lg max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col text-white">
+        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
+          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-yellow-500">Historique&nbsp;: {taskName}</h2>
+          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
+            <X size={24} />
+          </button>
+        </div>
+        <div className="overflow-y-auto pr-2">
+          {loading ? (
+            <p>Chargement de l&apos;historique...</p>
+          ) : history.length === 0 ? (
+            <p>Aucun historique pour cette tâche.</p>
+          ) : (
+            <ul className="space-y-3">
+              {history.map((event) => (
+                <li key={event.id} className="p-3 bg-gray-700 rounded-md text-sm">
+                  <div className="flex justify-between">
+                    <span>
+                      Action :{' '}
+                      <span className={`font-semibold ${
+                          event.action === 'done' ? 'text-green-400' :
+                          event.action === 'undone' ? 'text-red-400' :
+                          event.action === 'overdue' ? 'text-yellow-400' :
+                          'text-gray-400'
+                        }`}>
+                        {event.action === 'done' ? 'Nettoyage réalisé' :
+                         event.action === 'undone' ? 'Saleté relevée' :
+                         event.action === 'overdue' ? event.message || 'Tâche en retard' :
+                         'Action inconnue'}
+                      </span>
+                    </span>                    <span className="text-gray-400">
+                      {event.timestamp?.toDate ? event.timestamp.toDate().toLocaleString('fr-FR') : ''}
+                    </span>
+                  </div>
+                  <div className="text-gray-300">
+                    Par : {event.userEmail}
+                  </div>
+                </li>
+              ))}
+            </ul>
+          )}
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}

+import React, { useRef, useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+
+const ImageCapture = ({ onCapture }) => {
+    const videoRef = useRef(null);
+    const photoRef = useRef(null);
+    const [photo, setPhoto] = useState(null);
+
+    // Removed getVideo and takePhoto related logic for temporary simplification
+
+    const handleFileSelect = (event) => {
+        const file = event.target.files[0];
+        if (file) {
+            const reader = new FileReader();
+            reader.onload = (e) => {
+                const imageData = e.target.result;
+                console.log("File data selected:", imageData.substring(0, 100) + "...");
+                setPhoto(imageData);
+                onCapture(imageData);
+            };
+            reader.readAsDataURL(file);
+        }
+    };
+
+    const clearPhoto = () => {
+        let photo = photoRef.current;
+        if (photo) {
+            let ctx = photo.getContext('2d');
+            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, photo.width, photo.height);
+            setPhoto(null);
+        }
+    };
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        // No camera stream to clean up when camera is removed
+        // Cleanup: stop video stream when component unmounts
+        // if (videoRef.current && videoRef.current.srcObject) {
+        //     videoRef.current.srcObject.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
+        // }
+    }, []);
+
+    return (
+        <div className="image-capture-container">
+            <h3>Capture Photo pour Date de Péremption</h3>
+            
+            <label htmlFor="expiryFile" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1 mt-4">Télécharger une Photo de Date de Péremption</label>
+            <input type="file" id="expiryFile" accept="image/*" onChange={handleFileSelect} className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold" />
+
+            <canvas ref={photoRef} style={{ display: 'none' }}></canvas>
+            {photo && (
+                <div className="photo-preview">
+                    <h4>Photo Capturée:</h4>
+                    <img src={photo} alt="Capturée" />
+                    <button onClick={clearPhoto}>Reprendre Photo</button>
+                </div>
+            )}
+        </div>
+    );
+};
+
 export default ImageCapture;

+import { useState } from 'react'; // Import useState
+import { Package, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, XCircle, PlusCircle, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'; // Import PlusCircle and Trash2
+import { useInventory } from '../hooks/useInventory';
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs';
+import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth'; // Import useAuth
+import Card from './Card';
+
+export default function Inventory({ user, userData, showAdminView }) {
+  const { inventory, updateStatus, addInventoryItem, removeInventoryItem } = useInventory(); // Destructure addInventoryItem and removeInventoryItem
+  const { addLog } = useLogs();
+  const isAdmin = userData?.role === 'admin' && showAdminView; // Check for admin role
+
+  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');
+  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState('');
+
+  const getStatusColor = (status) => {
+    switch (status) {
+      case 'ok': return 'text-green-500';
+      case 'low': return 'text-orange-500';
+      case 'out': return 'text-red-600 animate-pulse';
+      default: return 'text-gray-500';
+    }
+  };
+
+  const getStatusIcon = (status) => {
+    switch (status) {
+      case 'ok': return <CheckCircle size={16} className="text-green-500" />;
+      case 'low': return <AlertTriangle size={16} className="text-orange-500" />;
+      case 'out': return <XCircle size={16} className="text-red-600" />;
+      default: return <Package size={16} className="text-gray-500" />;
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleStatusClick = async (item) => {
+    const statusCycle = { ok: 'low', low: 'out', out: 'ok' };
+    const nextStatus = statusCycle[item.status] || 'ok';
+    await updateStatus(item.id, nextStatus, item.name, addLog, user);
+  };
+
+  const handleAddInventoryItem = async (e) => {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    if (!newItemName.trim()) {
+      alert("Le nom de l&#39;article ne peut pas être vide.");
+      return;
+    }
+    try {
+      await addInventoryItem(newItemName.trim(), newItemCategory.trim(), addLog, user);
+      setNewItemName('');
+      setNewItemCategory('');
+    } catch (error) {
+      alert("Erreur lors de l'ajout de l'article: " + error.message);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleRemoveInventoryItem = async (itemId, itemName) => {
+    if (window.confirm(`Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer "${itemName}" de l'inventaire ?`)) {
+      try {
+        await removeInventoryItem(itemId, itemName, addLog, user);
+      } catch (error) {
+        alert("Erreur lors de la suppression de l'article: " + error.message);
+      }
+    }
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Inventaire" titleIcon={<Package />}>
+      <>
+        {isAdmin && (
+          <div className="mb-6 p-4 bg-black/30 rounded-lg border border-gray-700">
+            <h3 className="text-mictlan-gold font-bold uppercase text-xs mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
+              <PlusCircle size={14} /> Ajouter un article
+            </h3>
+            <form onSubmit={handleAddInventoryItem} className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
+              <div>
+                <label htmlFor="itemName" className="block text-gray-400 text-xs font-bold mb-1">Nom de l&apos;article</label>
+                <input
+                  type="text"
+                  id="itemName"
+                  value={newItemName}
+                  onChange={(e) => setNewItemName(e.target.value)}
+                  className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-600 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+                  placeholder="Ex: Serviettes, Verres..."
+                />
+              </div>
+              <div>
+                <label htmlFor="itemCategory" className="block text-gray-400 text-xs font-bold mb-1">Catégorie (optionnel)</label>
+                <input
+                  type="text"
+                  id="itemCategory"
+                  value={newItemCategory}
+                  onChange={(e) => setNewItemCategory(e.target.value)}
+                  className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-600 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+                  placeholder="Ex: Consommable, Vaisselle..."
+                />
+              </div>
+              <div className="md:col-span-2 flex justify-end gap-2">
+                <button
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={() => { setNewItemName(''); setNewItemCategory(''); }}
+                  className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-700 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-gray-600 transition-colors text-sm"
+                >
+                  Annuler
+                </button>
+                <button
+                  type="submit"
+                  className="px-4 py-2 bg-mictlan-gold text-black rounded-md hover:bg-[#b8942a] transition-colors text-sm font-bold"
+                >
+                  Ajouter
+                </button>
+              </div>
+            </form>
+          </div>
+        )}
+
+        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
+          {inventory.map((item) => (
+            <div
+              key={item.id}
+              onClick={() => handleStatusClick(item)}
+              className="bg-black/30 p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-800 hover:border-mictlan-gold/50 cursor-pointer transition-all group relative" // Added relative for absolute positioning of delete button
+            >
+              {isAdmin && ( // Admin only delete button
+                <button
+                  onClick={(e) => {
+                    e.stopPropagation(); // Prevent status click when delete button is clicked
+                    handleRemoveInventoryItem(item.id, item.name);
+                  }}
+                  className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1.5 bg-black/50 text-gray-400 rounded-full hover:text-mictlan-red hover:bg-black/80 transition-all"
+                  aria-label={`Supprimer ${item.name}`}
+                >
+                  <Trash2 size={14} />
+                </button>
+              )}
+              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
+                <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-300 uppercase tracking-wide">
+                  {item.name}
+                </span>
+                {getStatusIcon(item.status)}
+              </div>
+              <div className={`text-xs font-bold ${getStatusColor(item.status)}`}>
+                {item.status === 'ok' ? 'EN STOCK' :
+                 item.status === 'low' ? 'STOCK FAIBLE' :
+                 item.status === 'out' ? 'ÉPUISÉ' : 'INCONNU'}
+              </div>
+              {item.quantity && (
+                <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-1">
+                  Qté: {item.quantity}
+                </div>
+              )}
+            </div>
+          ))}
+        </div>
+
+        {inventory.length === 0 && (
+          <div className="text-center py-8 text-gray-500">
+            <Package size={48} className="mx-auto mb-4 opacity-50" />
+            <p className="text-sm">Aucun article en inventaire</p>
+          </div>
+        )}
+      </>
+    </Card>
+  );
+}
