-export default InventoryManagementDashboard;
+import React, { useState } from 'react';
+import ClientSuggestions from './ClientSuggestions';
+import ProductDecisions from './ProductDecisions';
+import ProductList from './ProductList';
+import ProductForm from './ProductForm';
+import DishForm from './DishForm';
+import DishList from './DishList';
+import ProductReporting from './ProductReporting';
+import TestDataManager from './TestDataManager';
+import OpeningDaysManager from './OpeningDaysManager';
+import ActivityLog from './ActivityLog';
+import Card from './Card';
+
+const InventoryManagementDashboard = () => {
+  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('products-list');
+
+  const getTabClassName = (tabName) => {
+    return `px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium ${
+      activeTab === tabName
+        ? 'bg-mictlan-gold text-black rounded-t-lg'
+        : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-mictlan-gold'
+    }`;
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Stocks Cuisine">
+      <div className="mb-4 border-b border-gray-700 overflow-x-auto">
+        <nav className="-mb-px flex space-x-4">
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('products-list')} className={getTabClassName('products-list')}>
+            Liste Produits
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('products-suggestions')} className={getTabClassName('products-suggestions')}>
+            Suggestions Produits
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('products-decisions')} className={getTabClassName('products-decisions')}>
+            Décisions Produits
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('add-product')} className={getTabClassName('add-product')}>
+            Ajouter Produit
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('dishes-list')} className={getTabClassName('dishes-list')}>
+            Liste Plats
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('add-dish')} className={getTabClassName('add-dish')}>
+            Ajouter Plat
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('product-reports')} className={getTabClassName('product-reports')}>
+            Rapports Produits
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('test-data')} className={getTabClassName('test-data')}>
+            Données de Test
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('opening-days')} className={getTabClassName('opening-days')}>
+            Jours d'Ouverture
+          </button>
+          <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('history')} className={getTabClassName('history')}>
+            Historique
+          </button>
+        </nav>
+      </div>
+
+      <div className="space-y-4">
+        {activeTab === 'products-list' && <ProductList />}
+        {activeTab === 'products-suggestions' && <ClientSuggestions />}
+        {activeTab === 'products-decisions' && <ProductDecisions />}
+        {activeTab === 'add-product' && <ProductForm />}
+        {activeTab === 'dishes-list' && <DishList />}
+        {activeTab === 'add-dish' && <DishForm />}
+        {activeTab === 'product-reports' && <ProductReporting />}
+        {activeTab === 'test-data' && (
+            <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
+                <TestDataManager type="products" />
+                <div className="border-t border-gray-700 pt-4" /> {/* Separator */}
+                <TestDataManager type="dishes" />
+            </div>
+        )}
+        {activeTab === 'opening-days' && <OpeningDaysManager />}
+        {activeTab === 'history' && <ActivityLog defaultCategory="inventory" />}
+      </div>
+    </Card>
+  );
+};
+
+export default InventoryManagementDashboard;

+import { useState } from 'react';
+
+export default function Login({ onLogin, onAnonymousLogin, settings }) {
+  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
+  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
+  const [error, setError] = useState('');
+
+  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    try {
+      await onLogin(email, password);
+    } catch {
+      setError("Identifiants incorrects");
+    }
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-mictlan-black p-4">
+      <div className="w-full max-w-sm bg-mictlan-dark-gray p-8 rounded-2xl border border-mictlan-gold/30 shadow-2xl">
+        <div className="text-center mb-8">
+          <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-mictlan-gold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase">Mictlan Terminal</h1>
+        </div>
+
+        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
+          <input 
+            type="email" 
+            value={email} 
+            onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Adresse e-mail"
+          />
+          <input 
+            type="password" 
+            value={password} 
+            onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full bg-black border border-gray-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white outline-none focus:border-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Mot de passe"
+          />
+          <button type="submit" className="w-full bg-mictlan-gold text-black font-black py-3 rounded-lg uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-yellow-600 transition-all">
+            Se connecter
+          </button>
+        </form>
+
+        {settings && settings.anonymousLoginEnabled && (
+          <>
+            <div className="relative my-6 text-center">
+              <hr className="border-gray-800" />
+              <span className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-mictlan-dark-gray px-2 text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase">Ou</span>
+            </div>
+
+            <button 
+              onClick={onAnonymousLogin}
+              className="w-full bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-mictlan-gold font-bold py-3 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest transition-all"
+            >
+              Connexion anonyme
+            </button>
+          </>
+        )}
+
+        {error && <p className="text-mictlan-red text-[10px] mt-4 text-center font-bold">{error}</p>}
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
 }

+const CollapsibleSection = ({ title, icon, children, isOpen, onToggle }) => {
+  return (
+    <section className="border-b border-gray-800 last:border-b-0">
+      <div
+        className="flex justify-between items-center p-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/5"
+        onClick={onToggle}
+      >
+        <h3 className="text-white font-bold uppercase text-xs flex items-center gap-2">
+          {icon} {title}
+        </h3>
+        {isOpen ? <ChevronUp size={18} /> : <ChevronDown size={18} />}
+      </div>
+      <div className={`transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out overflow-hidden ${isOpen ? 'max-h-screen opacity-100 p-4 pt-0' : 'max-h-0 opacity-0'}`}>
+        <div className="space-y-3">
+          {children}
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </section>
+  );
+};
+
+export default function Manual({ userData, currentPage, showAdminView }) {
+  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
+  const isAdmin = userData?.role === 'admin' && showAdminView;
+  
+  // State to manage individual section open/closed status
+  const [sectionStates, setSectionStates] = useState({});
+  // State to manage the global expand/collapse all status
+  const [areAllSectionsOpen, setAreAllSectionsOpen] = useState(true); // Start with all sections open by default
+
+  const sectionKeys = useMemo(() => ['tables', 'inventory', 'cleaning', 'logs', 'interface', 'audio', 'admin'], []);
+
+  // Initialize section states when modal opens or currentPage changes
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (isModalOpen) {
+      const initialStates = {};
+      sectionKeys.forEach(key => {
+        if (currentPage && key === currentPage) {
+          initialStates[key] = true; // Open current page's section
+        } else if (currentPage && key === 'interface') {
+          initialStates[key] = true; // Always open interface section if a specific page is given
+        } else if (currentPage) {
+          initialStates[key] = false; // Close other sections if a specific page is given
+        }
+        else {
+          // Default to true if isAdmin and key is 'admin', otherwise default based on areAllSectionsOpen
+          initialStates[key] = key === 'admin' ? isAdmin && areAllSectionsOpen : areAllSectionsOpen;
+        }
+      });
+      setSectionStates(initialStates);
+    }
+  }, [isModalOpen, areAllSectionsOpen, isAdmin, sectionKeys, currentPage]);
+
+  const toggleSection = (sectionKey) => {
+    setSectionStates(prev => ({ ...prev, [sectionKey]: !prev[sectionKey] }));
+  };
+
+  const toggleAllSections = () => {
+    const newState = !areAllSectionsOpen;
+    setAreAllSectionsOpen(newState);
+    const allStates = {};
+    sectionKeys.forEach(key => {
+      if (key === 'admin') {
+        allStates[key] = isAdmin && newState;
+      } else {
+        allStates[key] = newState;
+      }
+    });
+    setSectionStates(allStates);
+  };
+
+  const toggleAllButton = {
+    text: areAllSectionsOpen ? 'Tout Fermer' : 'Tout Ouvrir',
+    icon: areAllSectionsOpen ? Minimize2 : Maximize2,
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <button
+        onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(true)}
+        className="fixed bottom-4 right-4 bg-[#d4af37] text-black px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-[#b8942a] transition-colors z-10"
+      >
+        Manuel
+      </button>
+      {isModalOpen && (
+        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm">
+          <div className="bg-mictlan-dark-gray border border-mictlan-gold/30 w-full max-w-2xl rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-200">
+            <div className="flex justify-between items-center p-6 border-b border-gray-800">
+              <h2 className="text-mictlan-gold font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] flex items-center">
+                <span className="mr-3">📖</span> Guide Opérationnel
+              </h2>
+              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                <button
+                  onClick={toggleAllSections}
+                  className="p-1.5 bg-black/40 text-gray-500 rounded-lg border border-gray-800 hover:text-mictlan-gold transition-all"
+                >
+                  <toggleAllButton.icon size={14} />
+                </button>
+                <button onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} className="text-gray-500 hover:text-white">
+                  <X size={24} />
+                </button>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="max-h-[70vh] overflow-y-auto text-sm">
+              <CollapsibleSection title="Gestion des Tables" isOpen={sectionStates['tables']} onToggle={() => toggleSection('tables')}>
+                <div className="bg-black/30 p-3 rounded-lg">
+                  <h4 className="text-white font-bold text-xs mb-2">MODE CYCLE (VUE PAR DÉFAUT)</h4>
+                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400">Le cycle de vie d&apos;une table suit son parcours client. Cliquez sur une table pour avancer dans le cycle : <br/> <span className="font-bold text-gray-300">Libre → Occupé → Alerte → À nettoyer</span></p>
+                </div>
+                <div className="bg-mictlan-red/10 p-3 rounded-lg border border-mictlan-red/30">
+                  <h4 className="text-white font-bold text-xs mb-2">RÈGLES IMPORTANTES</h4>
+                  <ul className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 space-y-1">
+                    <li>• Le cycle ne boucle pas. Une table `À nettoyer` ne peut pas redevenir `Libre` par un simple clic.</li>
+                    <li>• Le bouton <b className="text-white">Reset (↻)</b> est la seule façon de rendre une table `Libre`.</li>
+                  </ul>
+                </div>
+                <div className="bg-black/30 p-3 rounded-lg">
+                  <h4 className="text-white font-bold text-xs mb-2">MODE TOGGLES</h4>
+                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mb-3">En mode &quot;Vue Détaillée&quot;, des boutons spécifiques apparaissent pour gérer les requêtes de chaque table :</p>
+                  <ul className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 space-y-2">
+                    <li className="flex items-center gap-2"><Bell size={14} className="text-mictlan-red"/> <b className="text-white">Appel Serveur :</b> Le client a besoin d&apos;un serveur.</li>
+                    <li className="flex items-center gap-2"><Utensils size={14} className="text-green-400"/> <b className="text-white">Prêt à commander :</b> Le client est prêt à passer commande.</li>
+                    <li className="flex items-center gap-2"><Moon size={14} className="text-purple-400"/> <b className="text-white">Ne pas déranger :</b> Le client ne souhaite pas être dérangé.</li>
+                    <li className="flex items-center gap-2"><RefreshCw size={14} className="text-orange-400"/> <b className="text-white">Assiette Suivante :</b> Le client demande le plat suivant.</li>
+                    <li className="flex items-center gap-2"><FileText size={14} className="text-blue-400"/> <b className="text-white">Demande l&apos;addition :</b> Le client souhaite régler l&apos;addition.</li>
+                    <li className="flex items-center gap-2"><CreditCard size={14} className="text-teal-400"/> <b className="text-white">Demande TPE :</b> Le client a besoin du terminal de paiement.</li>
+                  </ul>
+                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-4">Un bouton <b className="text-white">Reset</b> (<RotateCcw size={10} className="inline-block" />) est disponible en haut à droite de chaque table pour la remettre en statut `Libre`.</p>
+                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-2">Le bouton <b className="text-mictlan-gold">Vue Détaillée / Vue Cycle</b> permet de basculer entre le mode de cycle standard et le mode toggle.</p>
+                </div>
+              </CollapsibleSection>
+
+              {/* Nouvelle section pour la Checklist de Nettoyage */}
+              <CollapsibleSection title="Checklist de Nettoyage" icon={<CheckSquare size={14}/>} isOpen={sectionStates['cleaning']} onToggle={() => toggleSection('cleaning')}>
+                <div className="bg-black/30 p-3 rounded-lg space-y-3">
+                  <h4 className="text-white font-bold text-xs mb-2">Gestion des Tâches</h4>
+                  <ul className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 space-y-1">
+                    <li>• Chaque tâche a une fréquence de répétition (ex: &quot;1 fois par heure&quot;).</li>
+                    <li>• Le statut de la tâche (Fait / À faire) est affiché.</li>
+                    <li>• <b className="text-white">Bouton &quot;Fait&quot; / &quot;À faire&quot; :</b> Cliquez pour marquer une tâche comme terminée ou pour l&apos;annuler.</li>
+                    <li>• <b className="text-white">Historique (<History size={10} className="inline-block" />) :</b> Permet de voir l&apos;historique des exécutions d&apos;une tâche.</li>
+                    <li>• <b className="text-red-400">Supprimer (<Trash2 size={10} className="inline-block" />) :</b> (Admin seulement) Supprime une tâche.</li>
+                  </ul>

+                  <ul className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 space-y-1">
+                    <li>• Les tâches sont regroupées par catégories.</li>
+                    <li>• <b className="text-red-400">Supprimer Catégorie (<Trash2 size={10} className="inline-block" />) :</b> (Admin seulement) Supprime une catégorie et toutes ses tâches associées.</li>

-
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import ReactDatePicker, { registerLocale } from 'react-datepicker';
+import { useSettings } from '../hooks/useSettings';
+import "react-datepicker/dist/react-datepicker.css";
+import fr from 'date-fns/locale/fr';
+
+registerLocale('fr', fr);
+
+const OpeningDaysManager = () => {
+  const { settings, updateSettings, loading } = useSettings();
+  const [openingDays, setOpeningDays] = useState({});
+  const [currentMonth, setCurrentMonth] = useState(new Date());
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (settings.openingDays) {
+      setOpeningDays(settings.openingDays);
+    }
+  }, [settings.openingDays]);
+
+  const isClosed = (date) => {
+    const dateString = date.toISOString().split('T')[0];
+    if (openingDays[dateString] !== undefined) {
+      return !openingDays[dateString];
+    }
+    const day = date.getDay();
+    return day === 0 || day === 1; // Sunday or Monday
+  };
+
+  const toggleDay = (date) => {
+    const dateString = date.toISOString().split('T')[0];
+    const newOpeningDays = { ...openingDays };
+    newOpeningDays[dateString] = isClosed(date); 
+    setOpeningDays(newOpeningDays);
+    updateSettings({ openingDays: newOpeningDays });
+  };
+
+  const renderDayContents = (dayOfMonth, date) => {
+    const className = isClosed(date) ? 'closed-day-content' : 'open-day-content';
+    return (
+      <div onClick={() => toggleDay(date)} className={`w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer ${className}`}>
+        {dayOfMonth}
+      </div>
+    );
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <div className="p-4 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg">
+      <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-mictlan-gold mb-4">Gérer les jours d'ouverture</h3>
+      {loading ? (
+        <p>Chargement...</p>
+      ) : (
+        <ReactDatePicker
+          inline
+          selected={null}
+          onChange={() => {}} // No-op, as clicks are handled by renderDayContents
+          renderDayContents={renderDayContents}
+          locale="fr"
+          month={currentMonth}
+          onMonthChange={(date) => setCurrentMonth(date)}
+          key={JSON.stringify(settings.openingDays)}
+        />
+      )}
+      <style>{`
+        .closed-day-content {
+          background-color: #7f1d1d;
+          color: #fecaca;
+          border-radius: 50%;
+        }
+        .open-day-content {
+          background-color: #064e3b;
+          color: #d1fae5;
+          border-radius: 50%;
+        }
+        .react-datepicker {
+          background-color: #1f2937;
+          border: 1px solid #4b5563;
+        }
+        .react-datepicker__header {
+          background-color: #374151;
+        }
+        .react-datepicker__current-month,
+        .react-datepicker__day-name,
+        .react-datepicker__day {
+          color: #d1d5db;
+        }
+        .react-datepicker__day:hover {
+          background-color: #4b5563;
+        }
+      `}</style>
+    </div>
+  );
+  };
+
+  export default OpeningDaysManager;
+

+import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { ShieldAlert, HelpCircle } from 'lucide-react';
+import { useProducts } from '../hooks/useProducts';
+import { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { doc, updateDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
+import { useSettings } from '../hooks/useSettings';
+import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth';
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs';
+
+export default function ProductDecisions() {
+  const { products, loading } = useProducts();
+  const { settings } = useSettings();
+  const { user } = useAuth();
+  const { addLog } = useLogs();
+  const [notificationPermission, setNotificationPermission] = useState(Notification.permission);
+  const [feedbackMessage, setFeedbackMessage] = useState('');
+  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState('');
+  const [priceFilter, setPriceFilter] = useState('');
+  const [daysUntilDecision, setDaysUntilDecision] = useState(3);
+  const [showExplanation, setShowExplanation] = useState(false);
+
+  const categories = [...new Set(products.map(p => p.category).filter(Boolean))];
+
+  const isDayOpen = (date) => {
+    const dateString = date.toISOString().split('T')[0];
+    if (settings.openingDays && settings.openingDays[dateString] !== undefined) {
+      return settings.openingDays[dateString];
+    }
+    const day = date.getDay();
+    return day !== 0 && day !== 1; // Not Sunday or Monday
+  };
+
+  const getFutureOpenDate = (startDate, days) => {
+    let count = 0;
+    let futureDate = new Date(startDate);
+    while (count < days) {
+      futureDate.setDate(futureDate.getDate() + 1);
+      if (isDayOpen(futureDate)) {
+        count++;
+      }
+    }
+    return futureDate;
+  };
+
+  const getClosedDaysCount = (startDate, endDate) => {
+    let count = 0;
+    let currentDate = new Date(startDate);
+    while (currentDate <= endDate) {
+      if (!isDayOpen(currentDate)) {
+        count++;
+      }
+      currentDate.setDate(currentDate.getDate() + 1);
+    }
+    return count;
+  };
+
+  const expiringSoon = products.filter(product => {
+    if (!product.expiryDate) return false;
+    const expiry = product.expiryDate.toDate();
+    const today = new Date();
+    const decisionWindow = getFutureOpenDate(today, daysUntilDecision);
+    return expiry > today && expiry <= decisionWindow;
+  });
+
+  const productsNeedingDecision = expiringSoon.filter(p => {
+    const categoryMatch = categoryFilter ? p.category === categoryFilter : true;
+    const priceMatch = priceFilter ? p.price <= parseFloat(priceFilter) : true;
+    return p.decisionStatus === 'to_handle' && categoryMatch && priceMatch;
+  });
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (notificationPermission === 'granted' && productsNeedingDecision.length > 0) {
+      new Notification('Produits nécessitant une décision', {
+        body: `Il y a ${productsNeedingDecision.length} produits qui expirent bientôt.`,
+      });
+    }
+  }, [notificationPermission, productsNeedingDecision.length]);
+
+  const DECISION_LABELS = { promoted: 'Soldé', donated: 'Donné', destroyed: 'Jeté' };
+
+  const handleDecision = async (productId, decision) => {
+    const product = products.find(p => p.id === productId);
+    const productRef = doc(db, 'products', productId);
+    await updateDoc(productRef, { decisionStatus: decision, decisionDate: new Date() });
+    await addLog(
+      `INVENTAIRE : Décision "${DECISION_LABELS[decision] || decision}" prise pour "${product?.name || productId}".`,
+      'info', user, 'inventory'
+    );
+  };
+
+  const requestNotificationPermission = () => {
+    Notification.requestPermission().then(permission => {
+      setNotificationPermission(permission);
+      if (permission === 'granted') {
+        setFeedbackMessage('Notifications activées !');
+        new Notification('Notifications activées', { body: 'Vous recevrez des notifications pour les produits importants.' });
+      } else if (permission === 'denied') {
+        setFeedbackMessage('Notifications bloquées. Vous devez les autoriser dans les paramètres de votre navigateur.');
+      } else {
+        setFeedbackMessage('Vous recevrez une notification lors du prochain événement.');
+      }
+    });
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Décisions Produits" titleIcon={<ShieldAlert />}>
+      <div className="flex space-x-4 mb-4">
+        <select
+          value={categoryFilter}
+          onChange={(e) => setCategoryFilter(e.target.value)}
+          className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+        >
+          <option value="">Toutes les catégories</option>
+          {categories.map(category => (
+            <option key={category} value={category}>{category}</option>
+          ))}
+        </select>
+        <input
+          type="number"
+          placeholder="Filtrer par prix max"
+          value={priceFilter}
+          onChange={(e) => setPriceFilter(e.target.value)}
+          className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+        />
+        <div className="relative w-full">
+          <input
+            type="number"
+            placeholder="Jours avant décision"
+            value={daysUntilDecision}
+            onChange={(e) => setDaysUntilDecision(parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 0)}
+            className="w-full p-2 pr-8 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+          />
+          <HelpCircle
+            className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 cursor-pointer"
+            size={16}
+            onClick={() => setShowExplanation(!showExplanation)}
+          />
+        </div>
+      </div>
+      {showExplanation && (
+        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">
+          Nombre de jours ouverts avant l'expiration pendant lesquels une décision doit être prise.
+        </p>
+      )}
+      {notificationPermission === 'default' && (
+        <div className="mb-4">
+          <button
+            onClick={requestNotificationPermission}
+            className="w-full bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-400 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all"
+          >
+            Activer les notifications
+          </button>
+        </div>
+      )}
+      {feedbackMessage && <p className="text-center text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">{feedbackMessage}</p>}
+       {notificationPermission === 'granted' && !feedbackMessage && <p className="text-center text-sm text-green-400 mb-4">Les notifications sont activées.</p>}
+      {notificationPermission === 'denied' && <p className="text-center text-sm text-red-400 mb-4">Les notifications sont bloquées. Modifiez les paramètres de votre navigateur pour les autoriser.</p>}
+      {loading ? (
+        <div className="text-center text-gray-500">Chargement...</div>
+      ) : (
+        <div className="space-y-4">
+          {productsNeedingDecision.length > 0 ? (
+            productsNeedingDecision.map(product => {
+              const today = new Date();
+              const expiryDate = product.expiryDate.toDate();
+              const closedDays = getClosedDaysCount(today, expiryDate);
+              const diffTime = Math.abs(expiryDate - today);
+              const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
+
+              return (
+                <div key={product.id} className={`p-4 rounded-lg ${product.decisionStatus === 'to_handle' ? 'bg-red-900/50' : 'bg-gray-800'}`}>
+                  <h3 className="font-bold">{product.name}</h3>
+                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
+                    Expire le: {expiryDate.toLocaleDateString()}
+                  </p>
+                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
+                    Prix: {product.price}€
+                  </p>
+                  {product.decisionStatus === 'to_handle' && (
+                    <p className="text-sm text-yellow-400">
+                      Ce produit expire dans {diffDays} jour(s), et le restaurant sera fermé {closedDays} jour(s) d'ici là.
+                    </p>
+                  )}
+                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
+                    Statut: {product.decisionStatus}
+                  </p>
+                  {product.decisionStatus === 'to_handle' && (
+                    <div className="flex space-x-2 mt-2">
+                      <button
+                        onClick={() => handleDecision(product.id, 'promoted')}
+                        className="bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-400 text-white font-bold py-1 px-2 rounded text-xs">
+                        Promotion
+                      </button>
+                      <button
+                        onClick={() => handleDecision(product.id, 'donated')}
+                        className="bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-400 text-white font-bold py-1 px-2 rounded text-xs">
+                        Don
+                      </button>
+                      <button
+                        onClick={() => handleDecision(product.id, 'destroyed')}
+                        className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-400 text-white font-bold py-1 px-2 rounded text-xs">
+                        Destruction
+                      </button>
+                    </div>
+                  )}
+                </div>
+              )
+            })
+          ) : (
+            <div className="text-center text-gray-500">
+              <p>Aucun produit ne nécessite une décision pour le moment.</p>
+            </div>
+          )}
+        </div>
+      )}
+    </Card>
+  );
+}

-          </div>

-            <label htmlFor="unit" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Unité</label>
-            <select
-              id="unit"
-              value={unit}
-              onChange={(e) => setUnit(e.target.value)}
-              className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
-            >
-              <option value="g">grammes (g)</option>
-              <option value="ml">millilitres (ml)</option>
-              <option value="unit">unité(s)</option>
-            </select>
-          </div>
-        </div>
-
-        <div>
-          <label htmlFor="quantity" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Quantité <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>

-            required
-          />
-        </div>
-
-        <div>

-          <input

-            placeholder="Ex: Laitier, Viande, Légumes"
-          />
-        </div>
-
-        <div>
-          <label htmlFor="price" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Prix (optionnel)</label>
-          <input
-            type="number"
-            id="price"
-            value={price}
-            onChange={(e) => setPrice(e.target.value)}
-            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
-            placeholder="Ex: 2.50"
-            step="0.01"
-          />
-        </div>
-
-        <div>
-          <label htmlFor="photo" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Photo du Produit</label>
-          <input
-            type="file"
-            id="photo"
-            onChange={(e) => setNewPhoto(e.target.files[0])}
-            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
-            accept="image/*"
-          />
-          {(newPhoto || (currentPhotos && currentPhotos.length > 0)) && (
-            <img 
-              src={newPhoto ? URL.createObjectURL(newPhoto) : currentPhotos[0]} 
-              alt="Prévisualisation du produit" 
-              className="mt-2 max-h-32 object-contain rounded" 
-            />
-          )}
-        </div>
-
-        <ImageCapture onCapture={(imageData) => {
-            setCapturedExpiryImage(imageData);
-            handleScanProduct(imageData);
-        }} />
-        {ocrFeedback && <p className="mt-2 text-center text-sm text-blue-400">{ocrFeedback}</p>}
-        <div className="flex space-x-4">
-          <button
-            type="button"
-            onClick={onClose}
-            className="w-full bg-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-700 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
-          >
-            Annuler
-          </button>
-          <button
-            type="submit"
-            disabled={isSaving}
-            className="w-full bg-mictlan-gold hover:bg-mictlan-gold/80 text-black font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
-          >
-            {isSaving ? 'Mise à jour en cours...' : 'Mettre à jour Produit'}
-          </button>

+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import app, { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { doc, getDoc, updateDoc, Timestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
+// import { getFunctions, httpsCallable } from 'firebase/functions'; // Removed unused imports
+import { getStorage, ref, uploadBytes, getDownloadURL, deleteObject } from 'firebase/storage';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { PackagePlus } from 'lucide-react';
+import ImageCapture from './ImageCapture';
+
+export default function ProductEditForm({ productId, onClose }) {
+  const [productName, setProductName] = useState('');
+  const [weight, setWeight] = useState('');
+  const [unit, setUnit] = useState('g');
+  const [expiryDate, setExpiryDate] = useState('');
+  const [quantity, setQuantity] = useState(1);
+  const [category, setCategory] = useState('');
+  const [price, setPrice] = useState('');
+  const [currentPhotos, setCurrentPhotos] = useState([]); // Existing photos
+  const [newPhoto, setNewPhoto] = useState(null); // New photo selected by user
+  const [capturedExpiryImage, setCapturedExpiryImage] = useState(null);
+
+  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
+  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState('');
+  const [isScanning, setIsScanning] = useState(false);
+  const [ocrFeedback, setOcrFeedback] = useState('');
+
+  // No longer need to initialize functions via getFunctions(app) here
+  const storage = getStorage(app);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const fetchProduct = async () => {
+      if (!productId) return;
+      const docRef = doc(db, 'products', productId);
+      const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef);
+      if (docSnap.exists()) {
+        const data = docSnap.data();
+        setProductName(data.name);
+        setWeight(data.weight);
+        setUnit(data.unit);
+        setExpiryDate(data.expiryDate?.toDate().toISOString().split('T')[0] || '');
+        setQuantity(data.quantity);
+        setCategory(data.category || '');
+        setPrice(data.price || '');
+        setCurrentPhotos(data.photos || []);
+      } else {
+        console.error("No such document!");
+        onClose(); // Close if product not found
+      }
+    };
+    fetchProduct();
+  }, [productId, onClose]);
+
+  const handleUpdateProduct = async (e) => {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    setIsSaving(true);
+    setFeedback('Mise à jour...');
+
+    if (!productName || !weight || !expiryDate || !quantity) {
+      setFeedback('Veuillez remplir tous les champs obligatoires (Nom, Poids, Date de péremption, Quantité).');
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    try {
+      let photoURLs = [...currentPhotos];
+      if (newPhoto) {
+        // Delete old photos if any and new photo is uploaded
+        for (const photoURL of currentPhotos) {
+          const imageRef = ref(storage, photoURL);
+          await deleteObject(imageRef).catch(error => console.warn("Error deleting old photo:", error.message));
+        }
+        const storageRef = ref(storage, `product_photos/${Date.now()}_${newPhoto.name}`);
+        const uploadResult = await uploadBytes(storageRef, newPhoto);
+        const downloadURL = await getDownloadURL(uploadResult.ref);
+        photoURLs = [downloadURL]; // Replace with new photo
+      } else if (currentPhotos.length > 0 && !newPhoto) {
+        // If there were photos but no new one, keep existing
+        photoURLs = [...currentPhotos];
+      } else {
+        photoURLs = []; // No photos
+      }
+
+      const productRef = doc(db, 'products', productId);
+      await updateDoc(productRef, {
+        name: productName,
+        weight: parseFloat(weight),
+        unit: unit,
+        expiryDate: Timestamp.fromDate(new Date(expiryDate)),
+        quantity: parseInt(quantity),
+        category: category || null,
+        price: price ? parseFloat(price) : null,
+        photos: photoURLs,
+      });
+      setFeedback('Produit mis à jour avec succès !');
+      onClose(); // Close form after successful update
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error updating product:", error);
+      setFeedback('Erreur lors de la mise à jour du produit.');
+    } finally {
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      setTimeout(() => setFeedback(''), 3000);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleScanProduct = async (imageData) => {
+    if (!imageData && !capturedExpiryImage) {
+      setOcrFeedback('Veuillez capturer une photo de la date de péremption.');
+      setTimeout(() => setOcrFeedback(''), 3000);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setIsScanning(true);
+    setOcrFeedback('Scan en cours...');
+
+    try {
+      const base64Image = (imageData || capturedExpiryImage).split(',')[1];
+      const expectedFunctionUrl = `https://us-central1-dashboard-mictlan-dev.cloudfunctions.net/extractExpiryDateFromImage`;
+
+      const requestBody = {
+          data: base64Image
+      };
+
+      const response = await fetch(expectedFunctionUrl, {
+        method: 'POST',
+        headers: {
+          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+        },
+        body: JSON.stringify(requestBody),
+      });
+
+      if (!response.ok) {
+        const errorText = await response.text();
+        throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}, body: ${errorText}`);
+      }
+
+      const responseData = await response.json();
+      const result = responseData.result || responseData; // Handle SDK-like wrapper and direct response
+
+      if (result && result.expiryDate) {
+        setExpiryDate(result.expiryDate);
+        setOcrFeedback('Date détectée avec succès !');
+      } else if (result && result.message) {
+        setOcrFeedback(result.message);
+      } else if (responseData.error) {
+        setOcrFeedback(`Erreur: ${responseData.error.message}`);
+      } else {
+        setOcrFeedback(`Erreur inattendue: ${JSON.stringify(responseData)}`);
+      }
+
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error during OCR scan:", error);
+      setOcrFeedback(`Erreur lors du scan: ${error.message}`);
+    } finally {
+      setIsScanning(false);
+      setTimeout(() => setOcrFeedback(''), 3000);
+    }
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Modifier un Produit" titleIcon={<PackagePlus />}>
+      <form onSubmit={handleUpdateProduct} className="space-y-4 text-xs">
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="productName" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Nom du Produit <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <input
+            type="text"
+            id="productName"
+            value={productName}
+            onChange={(e) => setProductName(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: Yaourt Grec Nature"
+            required
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div className="flex space-x-4">
+          <div className="flex-1">
+            <label htmlFor="weight" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Poids <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+            <input
+              type="number"
+              id="weight"
+              value={weight}
+              onChange={(e) => setWeight(e.target.value)}
+              className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+              placeholder="Ex: 150"
+              required
+            />
+          </div>
+          <div className="flex-1">
+            <label htmlFor="unit" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Unité</label>
+            <select
+              id="unit"
+              value={unit}
+              onChange={(e) => setUnit(e.target.value)}
+              className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            >
+              <option value="g">grammes (g)</option>
+              <option value="ml">millilitres (ml)</option>
+              <option value="unit">unité(s)</option>
+            </select>
+          </div>
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="quantity" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Quantité <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <input
+            type="number"
+            id="quantity"
+            value={quantity}
+            onChange={(e) => setQuantity(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: 1"
+            required
+            min="1"
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="expiryDate" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Date de Péremption <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <input
+            type="date"
+            id="expiryDate"
+            value={expiryDate}
+            onChange={(e) => setExpiryDate(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            required
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="category" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Catégorie (optionnel)</label>
+          <input
+            type="text"
+            id="category"
+            value={category}
+            onChange={(e) => setCategory(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: Laitier, Viande, Légumes"
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="price" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Prix (optionnel)</label>
+          <input
+            type="number"
+            id="price"
+            value={price}
+            onChange={(e) => setPrice(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: 2.50"
+            step="0.01"
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="photo" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Photo du Produit</label>
+          <input
+            type="file"
+            id="photo"
+            onChange={(e) => setNewPhoto(e.target.files[0])}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            accept="image/*"
+          />
+          {(newPhoto || (currentPhotos && currentPhotos.length > 0)) && (
+            <img 
+              src={newPhoto ? URL.createObjectURL(newPhoto) : currentPhotos[0]} 
+              alt="Prévisualisation du produit" 
+              className="mt-2 max-h-32 object-contain rounded" 
+            />
+          )}
+        </div>
+
+        <ImageCapture onCapture={(imageData) => {
+            setCapturedExpiryImage(imageData);
+            handleScanProduct(imageData);
+        }} />
+        {ocrFeedback && <p className="mt-2 text-center text-sm text-blue-400">{ocrFeedback}</p>}
+        <div className="flex space-x-4">
+          <button
+            type="button"
+            onClick={onClose}
+            className="w-full bg-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-700 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
+          >
+            Annuler
+          </button>
+          <button
+            type="submit"
+            disabled={isSaving}
+            className="w-full bg-mictlan-gold hover:bg-mictlan-gold/80 text-black font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
+          >
+            {isSaving ? 'Mise à jour en cours...' : 'Mettre à jour Produit'}
+          </button>
+        </div>
+        {feedback && <p className="mt-2 text-center text-sm text-mictlan-gold">{feedback}</p>}
+      </form>
+    </Card>
+  );
 }

-        photos: photoURLs,
-        decisionStatus: 'to_handle',
-        creationDate: Timestamp.now(),
-      });

-      await addLog(`INVENTAIRE : Produit "${productName}" ajouté.`, 'info', user, 'inventory');

-  const productNames = [...new Set(products.map(p => p.name))];

+import { useState } from 'react';
+import app, { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { collection, addDoc, Timestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
+import { getStorage, ref, uploadBytes, getDownloadURL } from 'firebase/storage';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { PackagePlus } from 'lucide-react';
+import ImageCapture from './ImageCapture';
+import { useProducts } from '../hooks/useProducts';
+import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth';
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs';
+
+export default function ProductForm() {
+  const { products } = useProducts();
+  const { user } = useAuth();
+  const { addLog } = useLogs();
+
+  const [productName, setProductName] = useState('');
+  const [weight, setWeight] = useState('');
+  const [unit, setUnit] = useState('g');
+  const [expiryDate, setExpiryDate] = useState('');
+  const [quantity, setQuantity] = useState(1);
+  const [category, setCategory] = useState('');
+  const [price, setPrice] = useState('');
+  const [photo, setPhoto] = useState(null);
+  const [capturedExpiryImage, setCapturedExpiryImage] = useState(null);
+
+  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
+  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState('');
+  const [isScanning, setIsScanning] = useState(false);
+  const [ocrFeedback, setOcrFeedback] = useState('');
+
+  const storage = getStorage(app);
+
+  const handleNameChange = (e) => {
+    const value = e.target.value;
+    setProductName(value);
+    const match = products.find(p => p.name === value);
+    if (match) {
+      setWeight(match.weight ?? '');
+      setUnit(match.unit ?? 'g');
+      setQuantity(match.quantity ?? 1);
+      setCategory(match.category ?? '');
+      setPrice(match.price ?? '');
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleSaveProduct = async (e) => {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    setIsSaving(true);
+    setFeedback('Sauvegarde...');
+
+    if (!productName || !weight || !expiryDate || !quantity) {
+      setFeedback('Veuillez remplir tous les champs obligatoires (Nom, Poids, Date de péremption, Quantité).');
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    try {
+      let photoURLs = [];
+      if (photo) {
+        const storageRef = ref(storage, `product_photos/${Date.now()}_${photo.name}`);
+        const uploadResult = await uploadBytes(storageRef, photo);
+        const downloadURL = await getDownloadURL(uploadResult.ref);
+        photoURLs.push(downloadURL);
+      }
+
+      await addDoc(collection(db, 'products'), {
+        name: productName,
+        weight: parseFloat(weight),
+        unit: unit,
+        expiryDate: Timestamp.fromDate(new Date(expiryDate)),
+        quantity: parseInt(quantity),
+        category: category || null,
+        price: price ? parseFloat(price) : null,
+        photos: photoURLs,
+        decisionStatus: 'to_handle',
+        creationDate: Timestamp.now(),
+      });
+
+      await addLog(`INVENTAIRE : Produit "${productName}" ajouté.`, 'info', user, 'inventory');
+
+      setFeedback('Produit ajouté avec succès !');
+      setProductName('');
+      setWeight('');
+      setExpiryDate('');
+      setQuantity(1);
+      setCategory('');
+      setPrice('');
+      setPhoto(null);
+      setCapturedExpiryImage(null);
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error adding product:", error);
+      setFeedback('Erreur lors de l\'ajout du produit.');
+    } finally {
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      setTimeout(() => setFeedback(''), 3000);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleScanProduct = async (imageData) => {
+    if (!imageData && !capturedExpiryImage) {
+      setOcrFeedback('Veuillez capturer une photo de la date de péremption.');
+      setTimeout(() => setOcrFeedback(''), 3000);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setIsScanning(true);
+    setOcrFeedback('Scan en cours...');
+
+    try {
+      const base64Image = (imageData || capturedExpiryImage).split(',')[1];
+      const expectedFunctionUrl = `https://us-central1-dashboard-mictlan-dev.cloudfunctions.net/extractExpiryDateFromImage`;
+
+      const response = await fetch(expectedFunctionUrl, {
+        method: 'POST',
+        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
+        body: JSON.stringify({ data: base64Image }),
+      });
+
+      if (!response.ok) {
+        const errorText = await response.text();
+        throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}, body: ${errorText}`);
+      }
+
+      const responseData = await response.json();
+      const result = responseData.result || responseData;
+
+      if (result && result.expiryDate) {
+        setExpiryDate(result.expiryDate);
+        setOcrFeedback('Date détectée avec succès !');
+      } else if (result && result.message) {
+        setOcrFeedback(result.message);
+      } else if (responseData.error) {
+        setOcrFeedback(`Erreur: ${responseData.error.message}`);
+      } else {
+        setOcrFeedback(`Erreur inattendue: ${JSON.stringify(responseData)}`);
+      }
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error during OCR scan:", error);
+      setOcrFeedback(`Erreur lors du scan: ${error.message}`);
+    } finally {
+      setIsScanning(false);
+      setTimeout(() => setOcrFeedback(''), 3000);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const productNames = [...new Set(products.map(p => p.name))];
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Ajouter un Produit" titleIcon={<PackagePlus />}>
+      <form onSubmit={handleSaveProduct} className="space-y-4 text-xs">
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="productName" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Nom du Produit <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <input
+            type="text"
+            id="productName"
+            list="product-names-list"
+            value={productName}
+            onChange={handleNameChange}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: Yaourt Grec Nature"
+            required
+          />
+          <datalist id="product-names-list">
+            {productNames.map(name => (
+              <option key={name} value={name} />
+            ))}
+          </datalist>
+        </div>
+
+        <div className="flex space-x-4">
+          <div className="flex-1">
+            <label htmlFor="weight" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Poids <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+            <input
+              type="number"
+              id="weight"
+              value={weight}
+              onChange={(e) => setWeight(e.target.value)}
+              className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+              placeholder="Ex: 150"
+              required
+            />
+          </div>
+          <div className="flex-1">
+            <label htmlFor="unit" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Unité</label>
+            <select
+              id="unit"
+              value={unit}
+              onChange={(e) => setUnit(e.target.value)}
+              className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            >
+              <option value="g">grammes (g)</option>
+              <option value="ml">millilitres (ml)</option>
+              <option value="unit">unité(s)</option>
+            </select>
+          </div>
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="quantity" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Quantité <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <input
+            type="number"
+            id="quantity"
+            value={quantity}
+            onChange={(e) => setQuantity(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: 1"
+            required
+            min="1"
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="expiryDate" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Date de Péremption <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>
+          <input
+            type="date"
+            id="expiryDate"
+            value={expiryDate}
+            onChange={(e) => setExpiryDate(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            required
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="category" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Catégorie (optionnel)</label>
+          <input
+            type="text"
+            id="category"
+            value={category}
+            onChange={(e) => setCategory(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: Laitier, Viande, Légumes"
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="price" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Prix (optionnel)</label>
+          <input
+            type="number"
+            id="price"
+            value={price}
+            onChange={(e) => setPrice(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            placeholder="Ex: 2.50"
+            step="0.01"
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label htmlFor="photo" className="block text-gray-400 mb-1">Photo du Produit</label>
+          <input
+            type="file"
+            id="photo"
+            onChange={(e) => setPhoto(e.target.files[0])}
+            className="w-full p-2 bg-black/40 text-white border border-gray-700 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+            accept="image/*"
+          />
+          {photo && (
+            <img src={URL.createObjectURL(photo)} alt="Prévisualisation du produit" className="mt-2 max-h-32 object-contain rounded" />
+          )}
+        </div>
+
+        <ImageCapture onCapture={(imageData) => {
+          setCapturedExpiryImage(imageData);
+          handleScanProduct(imageData);
+        }} />
+        {ocrFeedback && <p className="mt-2 text-center text-sm text-blue-400">{ocrFeedback}</p>}
+
+        <button
+          type="submit"
+          disabled={isSaving}
+          className="w-full bg-mictlan-gold hover:bg-mictlan-gold/80 text-black font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
+        >
+          {isSaving ? 'Ajout en cours...' : 'Ajouter le Produit'}
+        </button>
+        {feedback && <p className="mt-2 text-center text-sm text-mictlan-gold">{feedback}</p>}
+      </form>
+    </Card>
+  );
+}

+import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
+import { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { collection, query, orderBy, onSnapshot, doc, deleteDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
+import { useEffect } from 'react';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { ListFilter, CalendarDays, Package, Tag, Scale, Edit, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
+import ProductEditForm from './ProductEditForm';
+import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth';
+import { useLogs } from '../hooks/useLogs';
+
+const STATUS_LABELS = {
+  all: 'Tous',
+  default: 'Par défaut',
+  to_handle: 'À gérer',
+  promoted: 'Soldé',
+  donated: 'Donné',
+  destroyed: 'Jeté',
+};
+
+const TWO_WEEKS_MS = 14 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
+
+export default function ProductList() {
+  const { user } = useAuth();
+  const { addLog } = useLogs();
+  const [products, setProducts] = useState([]);
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [error, setError] = useState(null);

+  useEffect(() => {
+    const q = query(collection(db, 'products'), orderBy('expiryDate', 'asc'));
+    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
+      const fetched = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
+      setProducts(fetched);
+      setLoading(false);
+    }, (err) => {
+      console.error("Error fetching products:", err);
+      setError("Erreur lors du chargement des produits.");
+      setLoading(false);
+    });
+    return () => unsubscribe();
+  }, []);
+
+  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
+    const now = Date.now();
+    return products.filter(product => {
+      if (statusFilter === 'all') return true;
+      if (statusFilter === 'default') {
+        if (product.decisionStatus === 'to_handle') return true;
+        const decisionDate = product.decisionDate?.toDate?.()?.getTime()
+          || product.creationDate?.toDate?.()?.getTime()
+          || 0;
+        return now - decisionDate < TWO_WEEKS_MS;
+      }
+      return product.decisionStatus === statusFilter;
+    });
+  }, [products, statusFilter]);
+
+  const handleDeleteProduct = async (productId, productName) => {
+    if (window.confirm("Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ce produit ?")) {
+      try {
+        await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'products', productId));
+        await addLog(`INVENTAIRE : Produit "${productName}" supprimé.`, 'info', user, 'inventory');
+        alert("Produit supprimé avec succès !");
+      } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error deleting product:", error);
+        alert("Erreur lors de la suppression du produit.");
+      }
+    }
+  };
+
+  if (loading) {
+    return (
+      <Card title="Liste des Produits" titleIcon={<ListFilter />}>
+        <p className="text-center text-gray-400">Chargement des produits...</p>
+      </Card>
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (error) {
+    return (
+      <Card title="Liste des Produits" titleIcon={<ListFilter />}>
+        <p className="text-center text-red-500">{error}</p>
+      </Card>
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <Card title="Liste des Produits" titleIcon={<ListFilter />}>
+        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
+          <label className="text-xs text-gray-400">Afficher :</label>
+          <select
+            value={statusFilter}
+            onChange={e => setStatusFilter(e.target.value)}
+            className="bg-black/40 text-white text-xs border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold"
+          >
+            {Object.entries(STATUS_LABELS).map(([val, label]) => (
+              <option key={val} value={val}>{label}</option>
+            ))}
+          </select>
+          <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">({filteredProducts.length} produit{filteredProducts.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''})</span>
+        </div>
+
+        {filteredProducts.length === 0 ? (
+          <p className="text-center text-gray-400">Aucun produit à afficher.</p>
+        ) : (
+          <ul className="space-y-4">
+            {filteredProducts.map(product => {
+              const expiryDate = product.expiryDate?.toDate?.();
+              const creationDate = product.creationDate?.toDate?.();
+              return (
+                <li key={product.id} className="bg-black/30 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-700">
+                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
+                    <h3 className="text-mictlan-gold font-bold text-sm uppercase">{product.name}</h3>
+                    <div className="flex space-x-2">
+                      <button
+                        onClick={() => setEditingProductId(product.id)}
+                        className="text-gray-400 hover:text-mictlan-gold transition-colors"
+                      >
+                        <Edit size={16} />
+                      </button>
+                      <button
+                        onClick={() => handleDeleteProduct(product.id, product.name)}
+                        className="text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors"
+                      >
+                        <Trash2 size={16} />
+                      </button>
+                    </div>
+                  </div>
+                  <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold ${
+                    product.decisionStatus === 'to_handle' ? 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400' :
+                    product.decisionStatus === 'promoted' ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' :
+                    'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400'
+                  }`}>
+                    {STATUS_LABELS[product.decisionStatus] || product.decisionStatus}
+                  </span>
+                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-gray-300 text-xs mt-2">
+                    <p className="flex items-center"><CalendarDays size={12} className="mr-1 text-gray-500" /> Péremption: {expiryDate ? expiryDate.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') : 'N/A'}</p>
+                    <p className="flex items-center"><Scale size={12} className="mr-1 text-gray-500" /> Poids: {product.weight} {product.unit}</p>
+                    <p className="flex items-center"><Package size={12} className="mr-1 text-gray-500" /> Quantité: {product.quantity}</p>
+                    {product.category && <p className="flex items-center"><Tag size={12} className="mr-1 text-gray-500" /> Catégorie: {product.category}</p>}
+                    {product.price && <p className="flex items-center"><ListFilter size={12} className="mr-1 text-gray-500" /> Prix: {product.price}€</p>}
+                    {product.photos && product.photos.length > 0 && (
+                      <div className="sm:col-span-2 w-full">
+                        <img src={product.photos[0]} alt={product.name} className="mt-2 max-h-24 object-contain rounded" />
+                      </div>
+                    )}
+                  </div>
+                </li>
+              );
+            })}
+          </ul>
+        )}
+      </Card>
+
+      {editingProductId && (
+        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-75 flex items-center justify-center z-50">
+          <div className="relative bg-gray-900 p-6 rounded-lg max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto w-full max-w-md">
+            <button
+              onClick={() => setEditingProductId(null)}
+              className="absolute top-3 right-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white"
+            >
+              &times;
+            </button>
+            <ProductEditForm productId={editingProductId} onClose={() => setEditingProductId(null)} />
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      )}
+    </>
+  );
+}

+import React from 'react';
+import Card from './Card';
+import { PieChart } from 'lucide-react';
+import { useProducts } from '../hooks/useProducts';
+
+export default function ProductReporting() {
+  const { products, loading } = useProducts();
+
+  const stats = products.reduce((acc, product) => {
+    const status = product.decisionStatus || 'to_handle';
+    acc[status] = (acc[status] || 0) + 1;
+    return acc;
+  }, {});
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Rapport sur les Produits" titleIcon={<PieChart />}>
+      {loading ? (
+        <div className="text-center text-gray-500">Chargement...</div>
+      ) : (
+        <div className="space-y-4">
+          {Object.entries(stats).map(([status, count]) => (
+            <div key={status} className="flex justify-between items-center p-4 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg">
+              <span className="font-bold capitalize">{status}</span>
+              <span className="text-mictlan-gold">{count}</span>
+            </div>
+          ))}
+        </div>
+      )}
+    </Card>
+  );
+}

+import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { db } from '../firebase/config';
+import { doc, getDoc, setDoc, collection, addDoc, serverTimestamp, query, orderBy, onSnapshot } from 'firebase/firestore'; // Added query, orderBy, onSnapshot
+import { Save, FileText, Loader } from 'lucide-react';
+import Card from './Card';
+
+export default function RequirementsCard() {
+  const [content, setContent] = useState('');
+  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
+  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState('');
+  const [versions, setVersions] = useState([]); // New state for versions
+  const [selectedVersion, setSelectedVersion] = useState(null); // New state to hold content of selected version
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const loadContent = async () => {
+      const docRef = doc(db, 'requirements', 'current');
+      try {
+        const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef);
+        if (docSnap.exists()) {
+          setContent(docSnap.data().text);
+        } else {
+          // If 'current' document doesn't exist, initialize it with a default value.
+          // This handles the "first version of the requirements contains those very instructions I am writing here" part.
+          const initialContent = "I would like to stay with the react framework but I would like to reintegrate lost features. I would like to have an icon in the table grid component to switch between linear cycle and toggles modes. I want a dynamic firebase collection. I want to map all the real life indicators or customer requests to the toggles (need waiter, ready to order, dont disturb, waiting for next plate reminder, requested bill, requested TPE). also I want to display the time since the last interaction so that the waiter needs to check if the customer needs anything even though they did no ask for anything. I would like to add 2 more cards at the bottom of the page. 1 will be the requirements of the app, it is a free text box, but a backup is made of it every day and you can navigate between the current version and the versions of the previous days. I would like that the first version of the requirements conains those very instructions I am writing here in this prompt. the second card is a table showing the app current implemented features and the date they were implemented on. then at the bottom of the page I would like the following icons with the corresponding links (elmicltan.fr website, el mictlan facebook, instagram, tiktok and google reviews for el micltan paris)";
+          await setDoc(docRef, { text: initialContent, lastUpdated: serverTimestamp() });
+          setContent(initialContent);
+        }
+      } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error loading requirements:", error);
+        setFeedback('Erreur de chargement.');
+      }
+    };
+    loadContent();
+
+    // Setup real-time listener for versions
+    const versionsCollectionRef = collection(db, 'requirements', 'current', 'versions');
+    const q = query(versionsCollectionRef, orderBy('timestamp', 'desc'));
+
+    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
+      const fetchedVersions = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({
+        id: doc.id,
+        ...doc.data(),
+        timestamp: doc.data().timestamp?.toDate().toLocaleString() // Convert Firebase Timestamp to readable string
+      }));
+      setVersions(fetchedVersions);
+    }, (error) => {
+      console.error("Error fetching versions:", error);
+    });
+
+    return () => unsubscribe(); // Cleanup the listener on component unmount
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleSave = async () => {
+    setIsSaving(true);
+    setFeedback('Sauvegarde...');
+    const docRef = doc(db, 'requirements', 'current');
+
+    try {
+      // 1. Get the current document's content before it's overwritten
+      const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef);
+      const previousContent = docSnap.exists() ? docSnap.data().text : '';
+
+      // 2. Compare content and save previous version if different
+      if (previousContent && previousContent !== content) {
+        const versionsCollectionRef = collection(db, 'requirements', 'current', 'versions');
+        await addDoc(versionsCollectionRef, {
+          text: previousContent,
+          timestamp: serverTimestamp(),
+        });
+      }
+
+      // 3. Update the current document with the new content
+      await setDoc(docRef, { 
+        text: content,
+        lastUpdated: serverTimestamp(), // Add lastUpdated timestamp
+      }, { merge: true });
+
+      setFeedback('Sauvegardé avec succès !');
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error("Error saving requirements:", error);
+      setFeedback('Erreur de sauvegarde.');
+    } finally {
+      setIsSaving(false);
+      setTimeout(() => setFeedback(''), 2000); // Clear feedback after 2s
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleSelectVersion = (versionText) => {
+    setSelectedVersion(versionText);
+  };
+
+  const handleRestoreVersion = () => {
+    if (selectedVersion) {
+      setContent(selectedVersion);
+      setSelectedVersion(null); // Clear selected version after restoring
+      setFeedback('Version restaurée. Cliquez sur "Sauvegarder" pour confirmer.');
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleClearSelectedVersion = () => {
+    setSelectedVersion(null);
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Cahier des Charges" titleIcon={<FileText />}>
+      <textarea
+        className="w-full h-48 p-4 bg-black/20 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl font-mono text-xs text-gray-300 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold/30 outline-none resize-none mb-4"
+        value={selectedVersion !== null ? selectedVersion : content} // Display selected version or current content
+        onChange={(e) => {
+          if (selectedVersion === null) { // Only allow editing if not viewing a historical version
+            setContent(e.target.value);
+          }
+        }}
+        placeholder="Saisissez ici le cahier des charges..."
+        readOnly={selectedVersion !== null} // Make textarea read-only if viewing historical version
+      />
+      <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
+        <button
+          onClick={handleSave}
+          disabled={isSaving || selectedVersion !== null} // Disable save if viewing historical version
+          className="bg-gray-800 hover:bg-mictlan-gold hover:text-black text-mictlan-gold font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-xs uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
+        >
+          {isSaving ? (
+            <Loader size={14} className="animate-spin mr-2" />
+          ) : (
+            <Save size={14} className="mr-2" />
+          )}
+          {feedback || (isSaving ? 'Sauvegarde...' : 'Sauvegarder')}
+        </button>
+
+        <div className="relative">
+          <select
+            onChange={(e) => handleSelectVersion(e.target.value === '' ? null : versions.find(v => v.id === e.target.value)?.text)}
+            className="appearance-none bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 text-mictlan-gold py-2 px-3 pr-8 rounded-lg text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-mictlan-gold/30"
+            value={selectedVersion ? versions.find(v => v.text === selectedVersion)?.id || '' : ''}
+          >
+            <option value="">Historique des versions</option>
+            {versions.map((version) => (
+              <option key={version.id} value={version.id}>
+                {version.timestamp}
+              </option>
+            ))}
+          </select>
+          <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center px-2 text-mictlan-gold">
+            <svg className="fill-current h-4 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M9.293 12.95l.707.707L15.657 8l-1.414-1.414L10 10.828 5.757 6.586 4.343 8z"/></svg>
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+      {selectedVersion && (
+        <div className="flex justify-end space-x-2 mt-2">
+          <button
+            onClick={handleRestoreVersion}
+            className="bg-mictlan-gold hover:bg-mictlan-gold/80 text-black font-bold py-1 px-3 rounded-lg text-xs"
+          >
+            Restaurer cette version
+          </button>
+          <button
+            onClick={handleClearSelectedVersion}
+            className="bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600 text-white font-bold py-1 px-3 rounded-lg text-xs"
+          >
+            Annuler
+          </button>
+        </div>
+      )}
+    </Card>
+  );
 }

-
-export default ReservationManager;
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import DatePicker from 'react-datepicker';
+import 'react-datepicker/dist/react-datepicker.css';
+import { getReservations, updateRemainingPlaces } from '../firebase/reservationActions';
+
+function ReservationManager() {
+  const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState(new Date());
+  const [services, setServices] = useState([]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const fetchReservations = async () => {
+      const data = await getReservations(selectedDate);
+      setServices(data);
+    };
+
+    fetchReservations();
+  }, [selectedDate]);
+
+  const handleRemainingChange = async (serviceName, providerName, newRemaining) => {
+    // Optimistic UI update
+    const updatedServices = services.map((service) => {
+      if (service.name === serviceName) {
+        const updatedProviders = service.providers.map((provider) => {
+          if (provider.name === providerName) {
+            return { ...provider, remaining: newRemaining };
+          }
+          return provider;
+        });
+        return { ...service, providers: updatedProviders };
+      }
+      return service;
+    });
+    setServices(updatedServices);
+
+    try {
+      await updateRemainingPlaces(serviceName, providerName, newRemaining);
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error('Failed to update remaining places:', error);
+      // Optionally, revert the UI update here
+    }
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <div className="container mx-auto py-8 px-4 text-white">
+      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-center text-[#d4af37]">Gestion des Réservations</h2>
+      <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
+        <DatePicker
+          selected={selectedDate}
+          onChange={(date) => setSelectedDate(date)}
+          dateFormat="dd/MM/yyyy"
+          minDate={new Date()}
+          className="bg-[#1a1a1a] text-white p-2 rounded-lg border border-gray-600"
+        />
+      </div>
+
+      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
+        {services.map((service) => (
+          <div key={service.name} className="bg-[#1a1a1a] p-6 rounded-lg shadow-lg">
+            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-[#d4af37]">{service.name}</h3>
+            {service.providers.map((provider) => (
+              <div key={provider.name} className="mb-4">
+                <h4 className="text-lg font-semibold">{provider.name}</h4>
+                <p>Réservations: {provider.reservations}</p>
+                <p>Places restantes: {provider.remaining}</p>
+                <p>Capacité totale: {provider.capacity}</p>
+                <div className="flex items-center mt-2">
+                  <label htmlFor={`remaining-${service.name}-${provider.name}`} className="mr-2">Modifier places restantes:</label>
+                  <input
+                    type="number"
+                    id={`remaining-${service.name}-${provider.name}`}
+                    value={provider.remaining}
+                    onChange={(e) => handleRemainingChange(service.name, provider.name, parseInt(e.target.value, 10))}
+                    className="bg-[#2a2a2a] w-20 p-1 rounded border border-gray-500"
+                  />
+                </div>
+              </div>
+            ))}
+          </div>
+        ))}
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+
+export default ReservationManager;

+import { useInventory } from '../hooks/useInventory';
+import { ShoppingCart } from 'lucide-react';
+import Card from './Card';
+
+export default function ShoppingList() {
+  const { inventory, loading } = useInventory();
+
+  const lowStockItems = (inventory || []).filter(item => 
+    item.status === 'low' || item.status === 'out'
+  );
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Liste de Courses" titleIcon={<ShoppingCart />}>
+      {loading ? (
+        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">Chargement...</p>
+      ) : lowStockItems.length > 0 ? (
+        <div className="space-y-2">
+          {lowStockItems.map(item => (
+            <div key={item.id} className="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-black/20 rounded-xl border border-gray-800/50">
+              <span className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-300 uppercase">{item.name}</span>
+              <span className={`text-[10px] font-black uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded-md ${item.status === 'out' ? 'bg-mictlan-red/20 text-mictlan-red' : 'bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-500'}`}>
+                {item.status}
+              </span>
+            </div>
+          ))}
+        </div>
+      ) : (
+        <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 italic uppercase font-bold">Tout est en stock.</p>
+      )}
+    </Card>
+  );
 }

+import { useState } from 'react';
+import * as Tone from 'tone';
+import { Activity, BellRing } from 'lucide-react';
+import Card from './Card';
+
+const alertStates = {
+  personnel: {
+    ok: { name: "Personnel", status: "Optimal", color: "text-green-500" },
+    alarm: { name: "Personnel", status: "Critique", color: "text-red-500" }
+  },
+  waitTime: {
+    ok: { name: "Temps d'Attente", status: "Normal", color: "text-green-500" },
+    alarm: { name: "Temps d'Attente", status: "Élevé", color: "text-orange-500" }
+  },
+  reviews: {
+    ok: { name: "Avis en Ligne", status: "OK", color: "text-green-500" },
+    alarm: { name: "Avis en Ligne", status: "Négatif Reçu", color: "text-red-500" }
+  }
+};
+
+export default function StatusDashboard() {
+  const [indicators, setIndicators] = useState([
+    { id: 'personnel', ...alertStates.personnel.ok, isAlarm: false },
+    { id: 'waitTime', ...alertStates.waitTime.alarm, isAlarm: true },
+    { id: 'reviews', ...alertStates.reviews.alarm, isAlarm: true },
+  ]);
+
+  const playAlarmSound = async () => {
+    if (Tone.context.state !== 'running') {
+      await Tone.start();
+    }
+    // Son d'alerte : Note plus grave et percutante (réutilisé de useAudio)
+    const synth = new Tone.MembraneSynth().toDestination();
+    synth.volume.value = -5;
+    synth.triggerAttackRelease("G2", "4n");
+  };
+  
+  const handleClick = (index) => {
+    const newIndicators = [...indicators];
+    const indicator = newIndicators[index];
+    const newIsAlarm = !indicator.isAlarm;
+
+    // Update the indicator with the new state
+    const newState = newIsAlarm ? alertStates[indicator.id].alarm : alertStates[indicator.id].ok;
+    newIndicators[index] = { ...indicator, ...newState, isAlarm: newIsAlarm };
+    
+    setIndicators(newIndicators);
+
+    if (newIsAlarm) {
+      playAlarmSound();
+    }
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <Card title="Alertes" titleIcon={<Activity />}>
+      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
+        {indicators.map((ind, i) => (
+          <div 
+            key={i} 
+            onClick={() => handleClick(i)}
+            className="p-4 bg-black/20 rounded-2xl border border-gray-800 text-center group hover:border-mictlan-gold/30 transition-all cursor-pointer"
+          >
+            <p className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1 flex items-center justify-center">
+              {ind.name}
+              {ind.isAlarm && <BellRing size={12} className="ml-1.5 text-red-500 animate-wiggle" />}
+            </p>
+            <p className={`text-xs font-bold uppercase ${ind.color}`}>{ind.status}</p>
+          </div>
+        ))}
+      </div>
+    </Card>
+  );
 }

-    };
-    addLog(statusMessages[nextStatus], 'info', userData, 'tables');
-  };
-
